clean_body: This is not a regular email... We're forwarding a critical message from Senator John N. Kennedy regarding the fragile state of our House Majority. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | This is not a regular email... Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. name: Jane Fonda
subject: Pramila needs each and every one of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260112-5804-footer&t=1001&akid=5804%2E420207%2EXKcyQ1 ]Pramila Jayapal

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51970?c0=pj-email-20260112.0x7fFe&refcode=em20260112-5804&t=1002&akid=5804%2E420207%2EXKcyQ1 ][IMG]

Peter, it’s Jane Fonda. You may know me as an actor or as
a bit of a troublemaker in Washington, so it’s safe to say I know a thing
or two about speaking truth to power and challenging powerful interests.

And I know how rare it is to find leaders who will do the same.

Pramila Jayapal is exactly the kind of leader I had in mind when I
launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: someone who listens to their
community, stands up to polluters, and never hesitates to put people over
profits.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51970?c0=pj-email-20260112.0x7fFe&refcode=em20260112-5804&t=1003&akid=5804%2E420207%2EXKcyQ1 ][IMG]

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51821?c0=pj-email-20260112.ZEqVRB&refcode=em20260112-5804&t=1004&akid=5804%2E420207%2EXKcyQ1 ]I will do whatever I can to send Pramila to Congress once again, but
she needs each and every one of us with her,
Peter. That’s what this
documentary moment requires. I hope you’ll consider making a split
contribution today to support her re-election campaign for Washington’s
7th District and help JanePAC elect more climate champions like her to
Congress and beyond.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51999?c0=pj-email-20260112.LvUMyA&refcode=em20260112-5804&t=1024&akid=5804%2E420207%2EXKcyQ1 ]Contribute $10

Right now, we’re watching a White House fully aligned with Big Oil make
dangerous, reckless decisions. When Donald Trump intervened in Venezuela
to chase oil and profits for his cronies, Pramila didn’t stay silent. She
spoke the truth plainly: this isn’t about helping the American people.
It’s about greed. And it will come at a real cost to working families here
at home.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51970?c0=pj-email-20260112.0x7fFe&refcode=em20260112-5804&t=1025&akid=5804%2E420207%2EXKcyQ1 ][IMG]

That kind of leadership is rare in Washington. And it’s exactly why I
trust Pramila.

For years, she’s been one of Congress’s strongest voices, standing up to
fossil fuel executives, calling out abuses of power by the Trump
administration, defending immigrant communities, and demanding that our
government work for people, not polluters. She’s led efforts to phase out
fossil fuel production, stop new dirty infrastructure, invest in climate
resilience, and create good clean-energy jobs in Washington State.

Pramila doesn’t flinch. She doesn’t hedge, and she never forgets who she’s
fighting for.

As we head deeper into 2026, we need leaders like her punching back from
Capitol Hill and reminding the rest of Congress what real courage looks
like. And she needs us, people like you and me, to have her back right
now.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51821?c0=pj-email-20260112.ZEqVRB&refcode=em20260112-5804&t=1026&akid=5804%2E420207%2EXKcyQ1 ]Peter, I’m
asking again because this race truly matters for the future of our
country, and early resources make a difference: Will you split a donation
today of any amount to support Rep. Pramila Jayapal’s re-election campaign
and help JanePAC continue building a movement strong enough to meet this
moment?

Your donation, along with contributions like it from people all over the
country, is how we will defend this critical seat and chip away at Trump’s
dangerous agenda once and for all.

Thank you for being a part of this movement.

With gratitude,
xx Jane Fonda

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260112-5804-footer&t=1027&refcode2=5804_420207_XKcyQ1&akid=5804%2E420207%2EXKcyQ1

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5804%2E420207%2EXKcyQ1

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

[ ]Peter, I’m asking again because this race truly matters for the future of our country, and early resources make a difference: Will you split a donation today of any amount to support Rep. Pramila Jayapal’s re-election campaign and help JanePAC continue building a movement strong enough to meet this moment? Your donation, along with contributions like it from people all over the country, is how we will defend this critical seat and chip away at Trump’s dangerous agenda once and for all. Thank you for being a part of this movement. With gratitude, xx Jane Fonda Contribute to Pramila Jayapal:

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: I’m starting with nothing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. * Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.

* Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty.

clean_body: You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) . 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

What if we told you that for the price of a cup of coffee in Oregon, you could have a real impact on our chances of defending this seat and helping Democrats take back the House?
You might not believe us, but it’s true!
Here’s the deal: National Republicans have been targeting Andrea’s seat for YEARS, spending millions to come within striking distance of flipping OR-06 TWICE. But with this grassroots team by our side, we’ve been able to overcome the flood of GOP dark money both times.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: First time in Texas history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240596%2E444211%2ELStp7m)
For the first time in modern Texas history, there will be a Democratic candidate on every single ballot line in this state. Every State House district. Every State Senate race. Every Congressional seat.
**That’s 205 races and 205 opportunities to show Texans that democracy doesn’t stop at the city limits or county line. That their voices matter no matter where they live.**
In 2025, Powered by People focused on building this foundation: recruiting candidates, organizing in places that have been overlooked, and building the kind of grassroots support to help Democrats win this year and in the years to come. These 205 races are about winning these contests and bringing more Democratic voters into our elections.
When we reach, register and turnout Texans for State House and Congressional races – even in places where Democrats haven’t held power in decades – we are improving the odds for our candidates and we are also sending votes up to the top of the ticket. Imagine Texas tipping the balance of power in Congress as all these new and activated voters across these 205 races send a Democrat to the U.S. Senate!
**We need to support these candidates, register voters in their districts, and grow our organizing power statewide. Powered by People was built for exactly this moment, but this work only moves forward because people like you choose to be part of it.**
[**Chip in today to help us meet this moment and turn these 205 opportunities into real, lasting change for Texas.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260112.GEyNNv&refcode=ema20260112-240596&t=3&akid=240596%2E444211%2ELStp7m)

Beto O’Rourke

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Should I assume we won’t hear back from you?
body:
Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder?
I know I've reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they've texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren't interested in these messages?

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. # Assemblyman Stan Ellis Endorses Nathan Magsig for Senate
---
|
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** January 12th, 2026Contact: nathan@nathanmagsig.com
---
| | | | | | **(Clovis, CA)** \- Today, Nathan Magsig announced that Assemblyman Stan Ellis endorsed his campaign for State Senate.
Assemblyman Ellis issued the following statement, _“I’m proud to endorse Nathan Magsig for California State Senate. Nathan has a proven record of leadership and understands that small businesses are the backbone of the Central Valley economy. He has consistently stood up for job creators, family-owned businesses, and local employers, and his commitment to cutting burdensome regulations and taxes will help our communities grow and thrive.”_

Magsig released the following statement, _“I’m honored to have Assemblyman Ellis’s support. Stan brings real-world business experience and a deep understanding of what it takes for businesses to succeed in California’s economy. With his endorsement, we’ll continue fighting for policies that help job creators excel, and keep our communities strong.”_
Assemblyman Ellis now joins State Senator Shannon Grove, Senate Republican Leader Brian Jones, and dozens of Senate, Assembly, and Central Valley leaders in endorsing Magsig’s campaign.
View the full list of endorsements [HERE](https://nathanmagsig.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566959e132b9980afc6311201&id=41cdcd8782&e=6cdbd718cb)
---
| | ###
Nathan Magsig is a current Fresno County Supervisor, former Mayor of Clovis, and is running for the 12th Senate District. His family, wife Julie and their three children, reside in Clovis, CA.

their backing, she calls herself a “proud pro-Israel Democrat.”

Peter, this is
it. This is the start. The AIPAC folks, the DMFI folks, and the entirety

prop up a candidate who would rather send our money abroad to drop bombs

of getting elected by alienating the young, multicultural voters who
make up the Democratic base. That could cost us Michigan and the
Senate majority.
2. Abdul will be attacked relentlessly. They will spend millions against
him on misleading ads to smear us. And we need the resources to get
the truth out.
3. We are the bellwether. Elsewhere in places like New York City, voters
have shown they’ll support anti-genocide, pro-peace candidates no
matter how much AIPAC or DMFI spends against them. If we show them
their money doesn’t buy them elections in Michigan, we can strike a
decisive blow to their stranglehold over the power in Washington, D.C.

We cannot win this race without significant grassroots contributions from

The good news is we can beat them. Multiple polls show we’re basically all

But that’s only going to happen if friends like you choose to back Abdul

| Peter,

As we head into 2026 I want to pause and ask something important.

_**What issues are most important to you?**_

This district is one of the most competitive in the country and I do not take that lightly. The only way we win tough races like this is by staying grounded in the people we represent and the people who power this campaign.

Your perspective helps shape where we focus our time, energy and resources in the year ahead.

[_**If you have a moment today, I would be grateful to hear from you.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123192251/594650419/-583598000?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmM3M2Q0MS1lNWVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QONer6Ae-0SDEp_8OIk7hjJPz_M3bdMMyNNNr-EcyDY=&emci=7c44222d-caef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=d2c73d41-e5ef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=7377580)

# Hello Capitalists,
### Here is everything you should be following today:
* Powell slams DOJ probe into his congressional testimony
* Gold and silver surge to new heights on news of the probe
* GOP rebel threatens to block all Fed picks
* Trump proposes a cap on credit card interest
* Bank stocks reel on credit card cap announcement

## The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left-Wing Journalism
[Support What We Do](https://substack.com/redirect/1b580d71-cbae-47b7-ba48-111b96d2d92d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Powell slams criminal probe as Trump intimidation
Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell revealed Sunday that the Justice Department has **[launched a criminal investigation into his congressional testimony](https://substack.com/redirect/a44fcf33-584d-4927-933b-369043156a5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on the central bank's $2.5 billion headquarters renovation, accusing President Donald Trump of using the probe to pressure the Fed into slashing interest rates faster. In a rare video statement, Powell vowed to defend the central bank's independence amid the escalating political clash.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a44fcf33-584d-4927-933b-369043156a5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Probe Targets Testimony** The investigation, first reported by The New York Times, focuses on whether Powell lied to Congress about the scope and costs of the multiyear Fed building renovation project.
* **Subpoenas Issued Friday** Federal prosecutors served the Federal Reserve with grand jury subpoenas threatening indictment, stemming from a July 2025 referral by Rep. Anna Paulina Luna alleging perjury and false statements.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cf328a39-852f-4eb4-b465-9e880639513e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* **Powell Blames Political Motive** He directly linked the inquiry to Trump's frustration over the Fed's refusal to cut rates aggressively, calling it an unprecedented threat to evidence-based monetary policy.
* **Markets React Uneasily** Stock futures dipped initially while gold rallied as a safe haven, with analysts warning of potential erosion in Fed credibility and broader implications for U.S. dollar strength.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with PolitiBrawl Shop](https://substack.com/redirect/02d2a23b-8073-448b-a4bd-9d13a3af31c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [They called him the Pirate President, now you can fly the "Jolly Donald" ](https://substack.com/redirect/02d2a23b-8073-448b-a4bd-9d13a3af31c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/02d2a23b-8073-448b-a4bd-9d13a3af31c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**An excellent way to display your American Pride and stand up to the woke MOB!**
**On your Boat, House or Truck, the message is clear!**
Made from 100% durable polyester, this flag is designed to withstand the elements while maintaining vibrant colors and high visibility. With its double-sided design, you can showcase it's message on both sides, ensuring that it looks great from any angle.
[Order your "Jolly Donald" flag today](https://substack.com/redirect/ee1b539c-19b6-4c41-97d0-ce0b3f615940?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Fed assault ignites gold silver rocket surge
Gold and silver **[smashed fresh all-time highs Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/72d4dab4-96c1-45a5-9414-ec0e03b491d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell warned that Trump administration threats and a DOJ probe are undermining the central bank's independence, driving investors to precious metals as a safe haven amid a weakening dollar and escalating geopolitical risks.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/72d4dab4-96c1-45a5-9414-ec0e03b491d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Powell blasts destabilizing** **pressure:** Fed Chair Jerome Powell described administration threats and an ongoing DOJ criminal probe over Fed headquarters renovations as a "deeply destabilizing event" fueling safe-haven demand for precious metals.
* **Gold blasts past 4600** : Gold futures surged 2% to exceed $4,600 per ounce, marking new records as investors flock to the metal amid fears over Fed credibility and broader economic uncertainty.
* **Silver outperforms dramatically** : Silver climbed above $84 per ounce, continuing its strong outperformance over gold in 2025-2026, boosted by industrial demand, China's export restrictions, and supply deficits.
* **Geopolitical risks amplify rally** : Beyond Fed tensions, record central bank gold buying, U.S. actions in Venezuela, threats over Greenland, and reshaping global power dynamics are pushing precious metals higher as protection against disorder.

* * *
* * *
# GOP Rebel Tillis vows to block all Trump fed picks
Sen. Thom Tillis (R-N.C.) announced Sunday he will **[oppose confirmation](https://substack.com/redirect/fae06470-4e68-43b6-8547-ef42f1167ad9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of any Trump nominee to the Federal Reserve--including the upcoming chair vacancy--until the Justice Department's criminal probe into Chair Jerome Powell for potential perjury is fully resolved, citing threats to the Fed's independence and DOJ credibility amid the administration's pressure on monetary policy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fae06470-4e68-43b6-8547-ef42f1167ad9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Tillis Questions DOJ Credibility** Tillis accused Trump advisers of actively undermining Federal Reserve independence, shifting scrutiny to the Justice Department's own integrity in pursuing the Powell investigation.
* **Probe Centers on Perjury Claims** The DOJ, led by U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro, is examining Powell's congressional testimony about Federal Reserve headquarters renovation cost overruns, which Powell calls a pretext for coercion on interest rates.
* **Banking Committee Stalemate Looms** As a key member of the Senate Banking Committee (13 Republicans, 11 Democrats), Tillis's opposition could prevent nominees from advancing on party-line votes, complicating Trump's plans to install a new chair by May.
* **Powell Defends Fed Autonomy** Powell publicly acknowledged the subpoena while rejecting it as unprecedented retaliation, warning it fits a pattern of administration efforts to erode the central bank's independence for political ends.

* * *
* * *
# Trump's 10% credit card cap shocks industry
President Trump has **[called for a one-year 10% cap on credit card interest rates](https://substack.com/redirect/c4cb28e2-3cfa-441d-be2e-6b0534285efa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/c4cb28e2-3cfa-441d-be2e-6b0534285efa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)starting Jan. 20, reviving a campaign pledge amid high consumer debt--but enforcement remains unclear, and bank insiders warn the move risks slashing credit access for millions, especially subprime borrowers, with potentially devastating economic fallout.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c4cb28e2-3cfa-441d-be2e-6b0534285efa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Enforcement Path Unclear** Major banks doubt quick implementation via Congress or regulators like the CFPB, which the administration has targeted for cuts; experts see the Jan. 20 deadline as pressure for voluntary compliance rather than binding law.
* **Stocks Plunge Sharply** Shares of key players like Capital One, JPMorgan, Citigroup, Visa, and Mastercard fell Monday as markets reacted to threats against profitable credit card operations.
* **Subprime Credit At Risk** Studies suggest over 80% of accounts with scores below 740 could lose access under a strict cap, forcing issuers to exit high-risk lending to avoid losses on subprime portfolios.
* **Broader Economic Drag Feared** Reduced rewards, higher prices from retailers and airlines, and shifts to costlier alternative debts could curb consumer spending and slow growth, with insiders calling impacts potentially "devastating" for families and businesses.

* * *
* * *
# Banks reel after Trump's credit card rate cap slam
President Donald Trump's call for a one-year 10% cap on credit card interest rates effective January 20, 2026, **[triggered sharp declines in bank stocks](https://substack.com/redirect/fcf3f521-3b77-4693-8e8d-c79c4b143af9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Monday, with Capital One plunging and specialized issuers like Synchrony tumbling, amid warnings the move could slash consumer credit access.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fcf3f521-3b77-4693-8e8d-c79c4b143af9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Banks Face Major Selloff** Capital One and Synchrony shares dropped 7-8% in early trading, while diversified giants like Citigroup fell nearly 4% and JPMorgan 2% as investors reacted to potential profitability hits.
* **Trump Doubles Down Enforcement** On Sunday, Trump told reporters banks failing to comply with the 10% cap would violate the law, though he offered no details on implementation.
* **Industry Warns Credit Crunch** Banking groups and analysts predict reduced lending to higher-risk borrowers, potentially cutting access for subprime customers and forcing reliance on costlier alternatives like payday loans.
* **Revives Campaign Pledge** The proposal echoes Trump's 2024 campaign promise, requiring congressional approval despite prior bipartisan bills for similar 10% caps that stalled in Congress.

* * *

So now they’re doing the only thing they have left: cheating.

clean_body: | | Republicans are trying to rig Florida’s elections, Peter. This week, DeSantis announced that Florida will take up congressional redistricting in April — because Trump and Republicans are scared they’re about to lose power in November. Their agenda is deeply unpopular. They’ve slashed healthcare for millions, put immigrants in internment camps, and handed out tax breaks to corporations while working people live paycheck to paycheck. People see it — and they’re rejecting it. So now they’re doing the only thing they have left: cheating. Here in Florida, Republicans are redrawing maps to knock out lawmakers they can’t beat fairly. And while they lie and scheme to protect their power, we’ll be doing what we’ve always done: organizing on the ground and reaching voters where they are. I didn’t get here with dark money donors like they did — and I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money. I’m here because people like you chipped in what you could and helped build this from the ground up. And right now, I’m counting on you again. name: Team Demand Justice PAC
subject: Are you kidding??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260112-61073&t=1001&akid=61073%2E1407376%2E3tvOtw ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260112-61073&t=1002&akid=61073%2E1407376%2E3tvOtw ]Demand Justice PAC

Emil Bove is proof of
Trump’s court takeover.

Bove has gone from Donald Trump’s personal criminal defense attorney to a
powerful DOJ official to holding a lifetime seat on a federal appeals
court, as if he can rule with impartiality.

Are you kidding?

And it’s just gone downhill since then. Emil Bove has:

* Publicly praised Trump’s pardon of a convicted drug trafficker — even
though Bove himself helped prosecute the case as a federal prosecutor.
* Declared his personal trust and loyalty to Trump’s judgment as
president while sitting on the federal bench.
* Attended a Trump rally at a partisan MAGA event, sitting just rows
from the stage as Trump attacked immigrants and so-called "political
enemies".
* Written a court opinion benefiting the Trump administration shortly
after joining the bench.
* Acted in ways that legal ethics experts say create a clear appearance
of partisanship and allegiance — not independence.

Judges are supposed to be independent. They’re supposed to uphold the rule
of law — not defend the president’s political decisions, show up at his
rallies, or behave like ethics rules don’t apply to them.

But Emil Bove doesn’t care. He’s more concerned with cozying up to Trump
for personal gain rather than actually doing his job.

Trump and his allies are packing the courts with loyalists and daring us
to look away while they lock in power for decades. This is what court
capture looks like, plain and simple.

Demand Justice exists to stop it. We expose judicial corruption, pressure
senators to stop rubber-stamping Trump cronies for lifetime seats, and
refuse to let corruption on the bench become normal or permanent. But we
can’t do this alone.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260112.0YyPKE&refcode=em20260112-61073&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61073%2E1407376%2E3tvOtw ]Chip in $5 right now to help Demand Justice fight back
against Trump’s court takeover and stop more Emil Boves from being
cemented on the federal bench.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260112.0YyPKE&amount=5&refcode=em20260112-61073&t=1022&akid=61073%2E1407376%2E3tvOtw ]Donate $5 ››

In solidarity,

Team Demand Justice PAC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.demandjustice.org/survey/less-emails?t=1023&akid=61073%2E1407376%2E3tvOtw

Email us: feedback@demandjustice.org

611 Pennsylvania Ave SE, #192, Washington DC 20003
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Contributions or gifts to Demand Justice PAC are not tax deductible.

name: Crush MAGA
subject: obscure race is a generational opportunity for dems
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u_f_xc6PS52_8kqLDGHKOYItv1GmQy0_G2qsCdeqPuDC8QZrvfAJb1qqSUc9hifeR4nQYBllXuJm1KxAGzkT0Sb6kla7H_0wrdT1bYO_4vQ2vr1mj1ghjvE6ELjWNQp3b7qBwLXQmu0B_HNptdYzA-4oOJ_J7WL4Ag78TF85WtK44Mdsc_7pUihf-NdunS4L3-xqV_K-Qb7xNrADpRAllatCX_nGZ7AXRUaMsO_G3RyqEcj59RXMng==&c=bznMNU8tiYz0oubzFI9mvEQXE4a-2ngYQUn5LGJVQ_L_ixi5xnjSbg==&ch=4WUqfvEXU15kvdn25XYvGi10Z2boAU66lv9SFzF1scCC06V1gY8-ww==)
---
| Peter,
If you're a sports fan, you are probably familiar with the saying "the best defense is a good offense."
Well, that's exactly why Defend Our Courts is prepping a major offensive in the Wisconsin state Supreme Court election this April.
Here's the state of play:

* The Wisconsin Supreme Court currently has a 4-3 liberal majority thanks to Wisconsin Dems absolutely embarrassing Elon Musk last year.

* One conservative justice was up for reelection this Spring, but decided not to run. The seat is now up for grabs in April.

* If Dems win this race, they will expand their majority to 5-2.

* Whoever wins will be elected to a 10 year term. After last year's WI court win, that means Democrats have an opportunity to guarantee a majority on the court until at least 2030.

---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u_f_xc6PS52_8kqLDGHKOYItv1GmQy0_G2qsCdeqPuDC8QZrvfAJb1qqSUc9hifeR4nQYBllXuJm1KxAGzkT0Sb6kla7H_0wrdT1bYO_4vQ2vr1mj1ghjvE6ELjWNQp3b7qBwLXQmu0B_HNptdYzA-4oOJ_J7WL4Ag78TF85WtK44Mdsc_7pUihf-NdunS4L3-xqV_K-Qb7xNrADpRAllatCX_nGZ7AXPS5mEG-LieuILhvSr31PGQ==&c=bznMNU8tiYz0oubzFI9mvEQXE4a-2ngYQUn5LGJVQ_L_ixi5xnjSbg==&ch=4WUqfvEXU15kvdn25XYvGi10Z2boAU66lv9SFzF1scCC06V1gY8-ww==)
---

This would be catastrophic to Trump and MAGA, who have been plotting to seize control of state Supreme Courts, the courts with final say on election laws/results, in key swing states across the country.
Last year, we helped lead the defense of PA's Supreme Court from a MAGA takeover. In Philadelphia, where we concentrated much of our voter outreach along with digital and TV ads, turnout surged by 34%. That was the largest increase in the state and Democrats blew MAGA out by 30+ points.
Now we're taking our winning strategy to Wisconsin to help Democrats seize on this once-in-a-generation opportunity.
But MAGA knows what's at stake here too, and they are gonna throw millions of dollars at this election to try and beat us. We only have 4 months to prepare, and that's not a lot of time in political campaigns. We need you on our side NOW:

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, If you're a sports fan, you are probably familiar with the saying "the best defense is a good offense." Well, that's exactly why Defend Our Courts is prepping a major offensive in the Wisconsin state Supreme Court election this April. Here's the state of play: The Wisconsin Supreme Court currently has a 4-3 liberal majority thanks to Wisconsin Dems absolutely embarrassing Elon Musk last year. One conservative justice was up for reelection this Spring, but decided not to run. The seat is now up for grabs in April. If Dems win this race, they will expand their majority to 5-2. Whoever wins will be elected to a 10 year term. After last year's WI court win, that means Democrats have an opportunity to guarantee a majority on the court until at least 2030. | == This would be catastrophic to Trump and MAGA, who have been plotting to seize control of state Supreme Courts, the courts with final say on election laws/results, in key swing states across the country. Last year, we helped lead the defense of PA's Supreme Court from a MAGA takeover. In Philadelphia, where we concentrated much of our voter outreach along with digital and TV ads, turnout surged by 34%. That was the largest increase in the state and Democrats blew MAGA out by 30+ points. Now we're taking our winning strategy to Wisconsin to help Democrats seize on this once-in-a-generation opportunity. But MAGA knows what's at stake here too, and they are gonna throw millions of dollars at this election to try and beat us. We only have 4 months to prepare, and that's not a lot of time in political campaigns. We need you on our side NOW: == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | | | | == | Let's take the fight to MAGA and Trump again. This time in the key battleground state of Wisconsin. name: Derek Tran
subject: My thoughts on the ACA extension win:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123193471/594654620/-1429052514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzRkM2JiZmMtZThlZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qyjr2QX_xYy0wGt39nb5A1pSqfsrNLfhUiGl9nI9RVo=)
Friend, For months, Republicans knowingly let ACA tax credits expire -- even as premiums spiked and families here in CA-45 were pushed to the brink. They watched thousands of working people scramble to keep coverage. They knew exactly what would happen. **And they did nothing.** Last week, after sustained pressure, House Democrats forced a fix and passed an extension to bring premiums back down and help families stay insured. But let me be clear: this never should have happened. When politicians play games with healthcare, real people pay the price -- choosing between medicine, rent, and groceries. That’s the kind of cruelty I ran for Congress to fight. **This win matters. But it’s fragile.** CA-45 sits at the center of the fight for the House majority. Republicans know it. That’s why they’re targeting me -- because they want to undo progress like this and go right back to putting corporate profits ahead of working families. **[If we lose this seat, protections like these are the first thing on the chopping block. So I need to ask: will you chip in $3 right now to help defend CA-45 and keep fighting for affordable healthcare?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123193473/594654622/-1429052514?refcode=em-1.12.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzRkM2JiZmMtZThlZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qyjr2QX_xYy0wGt39nb5A1pSqfsrNLfhUiGl9nI9RVo=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123193475/594654625/-1429052514?refcode=em-1.12.26-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzRkM2JiZmMtZThlZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qyjr2QX_xYy0wGt39nb5A1pSqfsrNLfhUiGl9nI9RVo=)

clean_body: | = Friend, For months, Republicans knowingly let ACA tax credits expire -- even as premiums spiked and families here in CA-45 were pushed to the brink. They watched thousands of working people scramble to keep coverage. They knew exactly what would happen. And they did nothing. Last week, after sustained pressure, House Democrats forced a fix and passed an extension to bring premiums back down and help families stay insured. But let me be clear: this never should have happened. When politicians play games with healthcare, real people pay the price -- choosing between medicine, rent, and groceries. That’s the kind of cruelty I ran for Congress to fight. This win matters. But it’s fragile. CA-45 sits at the center of the fight for the House majority. Republicans know it. That’s why they’re targeting me -- because they want to undo progress like this and go right back to putting corporate profits ahead of working families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for standing with me, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. It’s the only thing that can stop me.... I don’t need international law.” And on the nuclear arms control agreement with Russia, “if it expires, it expires.” He’s ready to incinerate international law, shred state sovereignty, and let the world burn in nuclear chaos. This isn't just politics; it’s an existential threat to humanity. We are the last line of defense. name: Mary Peltola for Senate
body:
Nate Silver calls Mary's decision "the biggest impact of any recruiting decision on Dems' overall chance of winning the Senate."
| **$20.** That is the contribution we are asking you to split between Mary Peltola's campaign for U.S. Senate in Alaska and Roy Cooper. $20 because Mary Peltola can win this race. She has already won statewide in Alaska and her decision to run puts this race in play. $20 because Nate Silver calls Mary's decision "the biggest impact of any recruiting decision on Dems' overall chance of winning the Senate." $20 because Mary Peltola needs to get off to a strong start and cannot do this alone. We know it probably seems like there is no way $20 can make a difference in one of the most competitive races in the country, but as you read this, people everywhere are contributing $20 of their own. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. What do you say? **[Can you please split a $20 contribution between Mary Peltola's campaign for U.S. Senate in Alaska and Roy Cooper today? She needs to get off to a strong start if she's going to have a chance to win this race.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4084?t=2&akid=335%2E124072%2EiAQyae)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $20](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4085?t=3&akid=335%2E124072%2EiAQyae)

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123194200/594656900/-1228673924?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWU4MjkwMS1lYmVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZ87ypeZLUrBSg2Y5pn7g4dtJTEIUPDL6gsozJmDGrM=)
This is a huge step forward that I’m deeply proud of:

**After months of pressure, the House passed an extension on the ACA tax credits that Republicans let expire at the end of December.**

These credits are essential in keeping healthcare premiums affordable for millions of Illinoisans. Now, it heads to the Senate -- and I urge them to pass it immediately and give Americans the relief they deserve.

Democrats didn’t back down from this fight -- and we won. This was only made possible by our united front, holding the line during the government shutdown, and from folks across IL-13 and beyond who urged their representatives to act.

No one should be forced to choose between putting food on the table and paying for healthcare coverage. This should have never been a partisan game with peoples’ lives.

This passage in the House is a sign of the results Democrats can deliver if we take the majority in November. **[If you’re with me in our shared fight, please consider chipping in $3 to keep me in Congress and protect this must-win seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123194201/594656931/-1228673924?refcode=em-1.12.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWU4MjkwMS1lYmVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZ87ypeZLUrBSg2Y5pn7g4dtJTEIUPDL6gsozJmDGrM=)**

Thank you,

Nikki

clean_body: Friend, don’t forget to sign Trump’s 1-year anniversary card. | | | | ANNIVERSARY ALERT! Just days remain until Trump’s 1-year anniversary as President. DON’T SHARE THIS WITH TRUMP BUT have you signed his card yet? President Trump received a beautiful message from you once and we’re confident that he’d love to see one from you AGAIN! That’s why YOU were one of the very few supporters selected to sign Trump’s card and add a personal message of praise, encouragement, or even constructive feedback. Don Jr., Kristi Noem, Karoline Leavitt, Marco Rubio and many other Trump allies have already signed this card. So, what’s the hold up? Your name will be proudly displayed on the official card delivered straight to President Trump. We’re confident that the boss will be devastated if he doesn’t see your name at the top! Now that we’ve officially entered a critical midterm year, we need your help to keep fighting. Thank you for your unwavering support. Last week, ICE agents shot and killed an American citizen in Minneapolis. This act of violence is yet another incident in their extensive record of violence over the last year.
Since her appointment, Kristi has proven to be an incompetent leader. She has disgraced our democracy, while abdicating her responsibility to due process of law and upholding the rights guaranteed by our Constitution.
Whether in Chicago, Los Angeles, or now Minneapolis, Kristi Noem’s Department of Homeland Security has ruined lives, ended lives, separated families, and destroyed communities. All while using her office for personal gain and to ensure that her political allies benefit from the chaos and terror that ICE agents have caused.

name: Mary Peltola
subject: Fish, family, freedom and fighting corruption
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-peltola?refcode=011226_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-peltola?refcode=011226_2]
Peter,
My name is Mary Peltola, and I want to share with you why I've made the decision to run for the United States Senate in Alaska — and to ask for your support as we begin this journey together.
But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to split a contribution today:
secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-peltola/founding-donor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-peltola?refcode=011226_2]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-peltola?refcode=011226_2]
Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision.
When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance.
Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity.
Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find.
So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just crushing Alaska families.
And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. They don’t even believe us.
They're focused on their own wallets — not ours.
And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest.
It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted.
I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home.
Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford.
Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again.
My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning.
But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption.
I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future.
This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race... and that is together.
So I am asking:
Please contribute to my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Real Texas PAC today to become a Founding Donor. We are looking for a huge number of day one donors to get our campaign off to a strong start and put us in a position to win. No donation is too small. They will all add up fast. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-peltola?refcode=011226_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Mary Peltola and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-peltola?express_lane=true&refcode=011226_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-peltola?express_lane=true&refcode=011226_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-peltola?express_lane=true&refcode=011226_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-peltola?express_lane=true&refcode=011226_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-peltola?express_lane=true&refcode=011226_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-peltola?refcode=011226_2&amount=25]
Thank you,
Mary

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

If you fail to fix this by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, I 'll have no choice but to put you on a 2026 Election MAGA Blacklist . | Thank you, Clay Fuller | | | PAID FOR BY CLAY FULLER FOR CONGRESS, INC PO Box 849, Trenton, GA, 30752, USA

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=184352789&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg0MzUyNzg5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjgyNDYzNTIsImV4cCI6MTc3MDgzODM1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zLXtvKjtPnZbwjE_V6yT-QS_E8IHHL7XvqxPemBWWOA)
---
| | [](https://substack..D61HvXsOHpw76V_KCV8EHQdSncQyT3weTl_2r2P7uPo?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/trump-is-trying-to-turn-the-federal?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Once again, Donald Trump is abusing the power of the federal government--this time by ordering the Department of Justice to investigate Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell because Powell won't step aside.
Powell released a video responding to the pressure, and in the calm, professional way only a career public servant can, he told Trump to go fuck himself. Not literally--but the message was unmistakable.
And that matters.
Because that's what a real public servant looks like: someone committed to the rule of law, to democratic institutions, to doing their job under Democrats or Republicans without turning it into a partisan weapon or a personal cash grab. Jerome Powell is one of the few people in government who's stood up to Trump's intimidation and lived to tell the tale.
The details of this "investigation" don't matter. We already know what it is. It's bullshit. It's the same playbook Trump used on James Comey, Letitia James, Adam Schiff, and anyone else who doesn't kneel.
* * *
**[Endless Urgency is free to read--thanks to our paid subscribers. If you've been enjoying the work, please help keep it available to everyone by becoming a paid subscriber. Just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e032e1-d158-4055-809d-0537bbb8d9c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e032e1-d158-4055-809d-0537bbb8d9c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Donald Trump cannot tolerate dissent. Anyone who refuses to obey becomes a target.
That's why an independent Federal Reserve matters. The Fed is supposed to make decisions based on what's best for the economy--not what benefits Donald Trump personally. Even if you disagree with Powell's rate calls, you should understand why independence from the White House is non-negotiable. Just like an independent DOJ _should_ be non-negotiable.
Trump hates anyone he can't control. Across the federal government, if you tell him no--if you say something's illegal or push back in any way--he'll try to remove you. That kind of loyalty test creates dangerous groupthink and leads to disastrous decisions. Jerome Powell keeps standing up to him, and every time he does, it sends a message to other public servants: you can resist this. Trump cannot allow that.
And let's be real--Trump wants to weaponize interest rates. He wants them lowered to juice the markets, inflate borrowing, and make it easier for himself and his cronies to rake in cash. Lowering rates right now could wreck the economy. The job market is shaky. AI is blowing up entire industries. Tariffs are driving up costs. Trump doesn't care. He wants cheap money. He wants power. Once the Fed is captured, it becomes another tool to punish anyone who steps out of line.
Powell's had the guts to contradict Trump publicly. Trump loves to brag about how "great" the economy is--then demand lower interest rates to "prove" it. Powell's been willing to say, nope, it's not that strong. The job market's under pressure. Lowering rates now could tank the economy and hurt workers. That's not partisan--it's his actual job. Trump can't stand that.
This is personal. Everything with Trump is personal. He feels challenged. He feels embarrassed. And when Trump feels embarrassed, he lashes out. That's why this looks exactly like what he did to Comey, Letitia James, Adam Schiff, Harvard, and Jimmy Kimmel. He will weaponize the federal government to punish people he doesn't like.
Going after Powell sends a chilling message to every federal worker: don't stand up to me. Don't cross me. Or I'll ruin you. We've already seen it--FBI officials purged for investigating January 6th. You think the people left behind are eager to investigate Trump now? Of course not. That's the whole point.
Trump thinks the rules are fake. Nothing's ever held him accountable. He's rich, connected, and shameless, and he genuinely believes the law doesn't apply to him. He wants to prove that to the country again.
* * *
**[Endless Urgency is free to read--thanks to our paid subscribers. If you've been enjoying the work, please help keep it available to everyone by becoming a paid subscriber. Just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e032e1-d158-4055-809d-0537bbb8d9c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e032e1-d158-4055-809d-0537bbb8d9c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Chaos is the point. This isn't some lazy "distraction" theory--it's deliberate. He floods the zone with bullshit so you can't focus. Just this week: ICE violence, political scandals, economic instability, January 6th anniversaries. He turns everything into a circus while the largest transfer of wealth in modern history keeps rolling in the background.
And at the end of the day, this is a loyalty test. Trump doesn't want a technocrat at the Fed. He wants a sycophant--someone who'll hand him the keys to the financial system.
The Fed isn't perfect. It's made real mistakes. It's often been callous toward workers. But those decisions were based on data--not revenge or political loyalty. Powell was appointed, confirmed by the Senate, and has served under both parties.
Now ask yourself: who would Trump replace him with?
Someone fighting for workers to buy homes, build wealth, and retire with dignity?
Or someone making sure Trump and his friends get cheap money--while the rest of us get screwed?
That's why this matters. That's why an independent Fed matters. And that's why this abuse of power is dangerous as hell.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/e2e032e1-d158-4055-809d-0537bbb8d9c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: The flu is nonpartisan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Staying healthy, speaking up, and why a great public health system is often invisible.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.2lwlZCiZ8byGdIslu_oSPlw_Jb6XhRK5l9gPK7Q0it4?) for more
---
# [The flu is nonpartisan ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=184348806&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg0MzQ4ODA2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjgyNDYxNDUsImV4cCI6MTc3MDgzODE0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.KBO-ajn6223l6ThLNSh1yVMOlSx4LT-_w0c6NuGTm68)
### Staying healthy, speaking up, and why a great public health system is often invisible.
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Jan 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvaGFsZXlmb3JtaS9wL3RoZS1mbHUtaXMtbm9ucGFydGlzYW4_.ODjjGxYoS1k206YvhuL7kIWoVTLcurs1_EaAn210i4k?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/the-flu-is-nonpartisan?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I hope this note finds you and your family staying healthy.
I truly mean that, because right now, a lot of people aren't.
Everywhere I go in Michigan, I'm hearing the same thing: classrooms a quarter-empty, workplaces short-staffed, parents juggling sick kids, and seniors unsure if it's safe to go out at all.
And the data backs it up: **This is one of the worst flu seasons we 've seen in decades. **Emergency rooms are packed. Doctor visits for respiratory illness are at record highs. From the flu to COVID to RSV - even colds that knock you out for a week - it's all hitting at once.
This is when a strong, steady public health system matters most. Instead, we're feeling the consequences of one that's been weakened beyond recognition.
Here's the thing: Public health doesn't make headlines when it's working. No one reports on the outbreaks that _didn 't_ happen, the kids who _didn 't_ get sick, or the paycheck you _didn 't_ miss.
_The Detroit News_ usually doesn't run headlines that say, "Everything Is Fine!"
But when our leadership fails us, ignores science, and replaces it with conspiracies, the consequences are real. Kids miss school. Parents miss work. Seniors land in the ER.
**And for so many families, getting sick is more than just inconvenient: It 's financially devastating. **If you're a small business owner, one bad flu can derail everything. Or if you don't have paid sick leave, a few days in bed can mean a missed paycheck and rent you can't cover.
The bottom line is this: **America thrives when Americans are healthy**.
That's what makes recent actions from the Department of Health and Human Services so dangerous.
Under Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr., we've seen dramatic shifts that undermine proven medical science at exactly the wrong time. Longstanding childhood vaccine recommendations were suddenly changed, career experts were pushed out, and confusion has rushed in to fill the void.
**This isn 't some abstract policy debate in Washington.** It's about whether parents can trust the guidance they get when their child's fever spikes. It's about whether local doctors have what they need to protect patients during a severe flu season.
I've spoken to doctors - Democrats and Republicans - who are alarmed. They're seeing confusion take root. And they know that when trust in public health breaks down, people suffer.
That's not acceptable.
That's why I introduced articles of impeachment against Secretary Kennedy.
Impeachment is a serious step, and I spent months diligently working with scientists, doctors, and congressional experts to get my articles of impeachment right. It's not something you do for political points. But when the person entrusted with protecting public health undermines science, spreads misinformation, and puts lives at risk - there has to be accountability.
**Public health is not a partisan experiment. It should be based on evidence, led by serious people, and focused on one mission: keeping Americans healthy.**
Michiganders get this. We show up for each other. We don't ask if someone is a Democrat or a Republican before bringing them soup or shoveling their sidewalk. We lend a helping hand because it's the right thing to do.
That's the spirit I carry with me in this work.
So if your household's been hit with illness this season, if you're worried about someone you love - I see you. I hear you. And I'll keep fighting to make sure our public health system is strong, trustworthy, and focused on protecting _you_.
Take care of yourself. And thank you for believing in science, compassion, and a government that actually helps its people.
With grit and gratitude,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/b6818aec-10d0-4980-8ab3-04be52c58359?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---

subject: In session 📚🍎📝

body:
|

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: And we might as well DEPORT every single Islamist | Peter, Radical Islam is OUT OF HAND in America. It 's time we finally got serious about this. There's nothing about their culture that coincides with American culture, and they've been doing everything they can to replace the Red, White, and Blue with Islamic extremism. And Americans across the country have been fooled into believing that a culture that puts men over women, chants "Death to America," and works directly with American adversaries can somehow intertwine with Leftist politics. Just look at New York City. The same city that vowed to "Never Forget" after 9/11 has just elected a Radical Islamic to be its mayor. If we don 't do something about it soon, we'll turn into the United States of Arabia. The FIRST step is to BAN SHARIA LAW and RADICAL ISLAM throughout America. The SECOND step is to CLOSE OUR BORDERS to third-world countries and Radical Islamic countries. The THIRD step is to DEPORT every single Islamist who is living among our communities, waiting to attack and bring "Death to America." But to no one 's surprise, this is going to be a tougher battle than winning the Iron Bowl. Democrats just see these Islamic Radicals as Blue Votes in November, they'll go down fighting to protect them. | Thank you, Coach Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? clean_body: | | | And ICE. Hi everyone, Last September, our neighbors in Chicago’s South Shore woke up to flashbangs and illegal raids. ICE agents kicked down doors and zip-tied children, violating federal court orders and human rights. Why couldn't these families warn each other? Because Apple and Google deleted the apps that document ICE activity, at the Trump regime's request. At Local Democracy Project, we know that true safety comes from community organizing, not corporate boardrooms. Yet, while Apple and Google silence our tools for accountability, they continue to profit from massive contracts with ICE and CBP. They are literally building the systems used to track our neighbors while stripping away our right to document the truth. Fck that sht. We cannot let Big Tech profit from state-sponsored abuse. ** Local power belongs to the people, not the billionaires who fold under a single phone call. In solidarity, The Local Democracy Project Team supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . **This seat is one of our best opportunities to take back the Senate.**

Mary Peltola has already proven she can win statewide in Alaska: She was elected to the state’s at-large U.S. House seat twice before losing by less than three percentage points in 2024. _(Meanwhile, that same year, Trump won the state by 13 points!)_

She’s a proven leader and a fierce advocate for Alaska — not special interests or extremist agendas. Mary was the first woman to represent Alaska in the House of Representatives AND the first Alaska Native member of Congress.

This will be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country. Republicans are already gearing up to pour _millions_ into stopping Mary and propping up her opponent Dan Sullivan.

If we’re going to win, we need to meet this moment _now_. Winning a Senate seat takes resources, organization, and momentum, so this is where the power of EMILYs List can make all the difference.

[**With our help, Democratic pro-choice women like Mary can flip this seat and secure a Democratic Senate majority in 2026. Will you chip in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123194965/594659524/-1894566299?refcode=WUEFEM18_20260112_PeltolaDive_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057594&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjM4ODIyNi1lZmVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6dRsJwqDYLEtzQ3DJJFhVg5ekGWuOG2AnM-IOtlYAI=)
