clean_body: Mary has already proven she can win in Alaska | = Peter, I have some exciting news to share: EMILYs List is proud to endorse Mary Peltola for U.S. Senate in Alaska today. = | = This seat is one of our best opportunities to take back the Senate. Mary Peltola has already proven she can win statewide in Alaska: She was elected to the state’s at-large U.S. House seat twice before losing by less than three percentage points in 2024. (Meanwhile, that same year, Trump won the state by 13 points!) She’s a proven leader and a fierce advocate for Alaska — not special interests or extremist agendas. Mary was the first woman to represent Alaska in the House of Representatives AND the first Alaska Native member of Congress. This will be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country. Republicans are already gearing up to pour millions into stopping Mary and propping up her opponent Dan Sullivan. If we’re going to win, we need to meet this moment now. Winning a Senate seat takes resources, organization, and momentum, so this is where the power of EMILYs List can make all the difference. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Tiernan Donohue (she/her/hers) Chief Campaigns Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123195197/594660211/-1539782837?refcode=email_011226_peltola&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmMxMWViNS1mMGVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Te3xc4Fnx4sgZ5g72gNesNRfotQQLHuRMfosAQTqBnw=) Hello - My name is Mary Peltola, and I want to share with you why I've made the decision to run for the United States Senate in Alaska — and to ask for your support as we begin this journey together. But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to split a contribution today: **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-davids-peltola-split](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123195198/594660212/-1539782837?refcode=email_011226_peltola&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmMxMWViNS1mMGVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Te3xc4Fnx4sgZ5g72gNesNRfotQQLHuRMfosAQTqBnw=)_** | | **_[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123195199/594660213/-1539782837?refcode=email_011226_peltola&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmMxMWViNS1mMGVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Te3xc4Fnx4sgZ5g72gNesNRfotQQLHuRMfosAQTqBnw=)_**
---
Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision.
When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance.
Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity.
Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find.
So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just _crushing_ Alaska families.
And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. _They don’t even believe us._
They're focused on their own wallets — not ours.
And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest.
It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted.
I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home.
Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford.
Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again.
My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning.
But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption.
I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future.
**This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race... and that is together.**
So I am asking:
**_[Please contribute to my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Sharice Davids today to become a Founding Donor. We are looking for a huge number of day one donors to get our campaign off to a strong start and put us in a position to win. No donation is too small. They will all add up fast.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123195200/594660214/-1539782837?refcode=email_011226_peltola&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmMxMWViNS1mMGVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Te3xc4Fnx4sgZ5g72gNesNRfotQQLHuRMfosAQTqBnw=)_**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I’m suing Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth want to use the power of the White House and the Department of Defense to silence me because they don’t like what I have to say.
#

Team, it's Mark.
I am suing the Secretary of Defense.
After 25 years in uniform and another 5 in the United States Senate, I never imagined I’d have to do something like this. Hegseth has left me no choice.
Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth want to use the power of the White House and the Department of Defense to punish me because they don’t like what I have to say. Their attacks are directed at me right now, but they’re trying to send a message to every retired member of the military:
Speak out against us and we will come after you with every tool we have at our disposal. We’ll censure you, we’ll threaten your rank and retirement, and we might even court-martial you.
It’s unconstitutional, so I’m suing them. Beyond this lawsuit, it’s important we send a message to Trump and Hegseth to show them just how many people are on this team to defend constitutional rights. That’s where you come in.
I’ve been truly humbled by the support people have sent my way over the past couple of months. It means the world to me that so many of you care about what Trump and Hegseth are trying to do.
That’s how we’ve made it this far, and it’s how we’ll get to the other side of this dark chapter in our nation’s history. Together.
If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a stand and join the fight, this is it.
[**Please, if you can spare a quick donation, can I count on you to chip in?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan26-dod.oeiXQe&refcode=em260112-1-90&t=1&akid=6330%2E6688874%2ELHGr3x)

Fresh FEC filings show Trump-aligned super PACs heading into 2026 with nearly $300 million cash-on-hand.
That's massive— _but it doesn't knock doors, chase mail-in ballots, or turn out conservatives in the trenches._
**Turning Point PAC does...**
We're the grassroots force that built the most ambitious ballot-chasing operation in conservative history: over 315,000 ballots chased in Arizona alone in 2024, flipping key states and securing America First wins.
Now, with socialists dumping dark money to reclaim Congress, we're laser-focused on the most critical swing districts and states: AZ, GA, NC, MI, PA, WI, NV—where Senate and House races will be decided by hundreds of votes.
The midterm election on November 3, 2026? It won't be won that day.
**It will be won months earlier—through relentless preparation: voter lists, app tech, door-to-door chasing, and getting every disengaged conservative ballot returned.**
**[We need your urgent support to scale this up and surpass 2024. Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Ximena, United We Dream
subject: 👉Join hundreds of us at our“ICE Out of Our Communities” virtual call!
body:
We know the future our communities need is bigger than this. | | | Hey Peter, Our communities have spoken, and we’re choosing to build a future where everyone is free to live, speak, and be ourselves.**❤️🔥**[**Hundreds of us are coming together tomorrow night at our “Powered by the People: ICE Out of Our Communities” Call to learn how to face this moment together. Will I see you there?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpJkBbhGRNtTmx-2TcxL_YOvmW9WhHUD9PyxpZzlEw09FyS8JG3zG4RNfhgNNGHDL67qJ0zbvZiEfqMPdNMyvEaQi2PDo1awYMS6YKUfJne7v7KP-ASPPChSDnK1Cd_3a8dvWAZN_x_6035qrvnW__6pK1HPM1YOgC8TnBvAE-b-z3kO013U4V8NPrk2J44lnR89_AfWS09kzqb67gsf0z7Rqz1-KJVA1RW65zz83SalEGtGDubg4VXgsfFhbon4p5O7DoB-DdFcNnp6wz591swQ/4n8/sYRbBciIRFyuCRcLk5TuzQ/h0/h001.5daaRZRBbNnpIpLq6EjHOF8itKXSW0DGuaHIlV0HPJk) From the 31 lives lost at the hands of immigration enforcement in just the last year, to the U.S. attack on Venezuela, young people are sitting with anger, fear, and uncertainty about the world that was handed to us. We’re tired of a system that weaponizes our taxpayer dollars against our communities, snatching our neighbors off the streets and tearing families apart. **But we also know the future our communities need and deserve is bigger than this**. We know our power comes from us, the people, standing united as one to bring on the change we need. Community and non-violent mass organizing are our key to surviving this moment of rising terror. 🤝 [**Will you join us TOMORROW, Tuesday, January 13, at 7:30 pm ET/ 6:30 pm CT to make meaning of this moment and learn how to host welcoming spaces where our communities can heal, organize, and build together?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpJkBbhGRNtTmx-2TcxL_YOvmW9WhHUD9PyxpZzlEw09E_BSwjrCv5VWInKvtP6pqOTPQkfB1_Yo5FCDahzq6MWNZQZW0eXByUUP1fC97UFK6Qmx3xKdtiO9Ge2TIE_rUBmcNB-j7AQPS4Ce2eAlWr2wUGRnCdATj7P4H73R2LrfTGON1__66Eb1s3ivbPvn1UsFytwZ0EppPd0HjHgBDBdR8rrXFf29w-lBiGDeQssg9RZ19v01SKRA-oji3XlpEhHwDtsM1Qw0s61AqZDeehzQ/4n8/sYRbBciIRFyuCRcLk5TuzQ/h1/h001.EAEr6TrxZclPzKAVAKEdPd_dbmuJSIjogbny0UHhdOs) 👈](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpJkBbhGRNtTmx-2TcxL_YOvmW9WhHUD9PyxpZzlEw09GX3LxQh5r3cBo0jpocZL9O7uVWbrErZYGpmgL-fMUaRZ8OghLoPITtU2lYqdWhqqNmtlx9-kFGpAR5WDn-FBN0XpAZ1VjgEy1-bxgbXCg18nNYTWyCwn4Aw1p7Uw50UdZsMHHq4SNEf5RyYLiB7JSXJlHRcpuhDick4bc3F2dp9cfcQChj9Cyfl-E1LZC_mhUZSWjl_TJHD8ZzaeyOU44jWYefB7qhz9pVvg3QKDv_Xg/4n8/sYRbBciIRFyuCRcLk5TuzQ/h2/h001.0ldaTknHMMMKXpy7E_jmcZUebPBNUuhZ9mnoUOsl74M)** Together we can build a future that doesn’t include destruction and death, and one where we have everything we need. That’s where you come in, Peter. You have the power to bring your next door neighbors, classmates, and family members together to organize for an abundant future. 📣 [**Join us tomorrow night at 7:30 pm ET/ 6:30 pm CT to learn how to host your own welcoming space with your friends and neighbors and build non-violent, peaceful resilience together!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHpJkBbhGRNtTmx-2TcxL_YOvmW9WhHUD9PyxpZzlEw09EBn-APZB5F1nF2okXcZU8AT8kb35kNAbT-mVskrwQcFoM-hMAwM2woj-OchuFWubMPgBRpNXKMBqNkSi90L_mWaoPPoPPm8kbdyrlIiCUEDohfIuNHJKQKdXHU-kgxp6M2KuxOdjlnL5GB28oWwgCIPFt3N3Dox6preeEnqcxC88BNwXGTU0XYKTx0ILhwvMQVAEqCGKGFGs1L4pN5pe5xAJ_jHsFjNBkXe57iFW1ISw/4n8/sYRbBciIRFyuCRcLk5TuzQ/h5/h001.tZc_GuDB6M2G7Oq_eP9gx_pJy5RYWHYZ-DJzaNVGFO0) Come learn and be in community! — Ximena and the United We Dream team

clean_body: We know the future our communities need is bigger than this. | | | Hey Peter, Our communities have spoken, and we’re choosing to build a future where everyone is free to live, speak, and be ourselves.❤️🔥 From the 31 lives lost at the hands of immigration enforcement in just the last year, to the U.S. attack on Venezuela, young people are sitting with anger, fear, and uncertainty about the world that was handed to us. We’re tired of a system that weaponizes our taxpayer dollars against our communities, snatching our neighbors off the streets and tearing families apart. But we also know the future our communities need and deserve is bigger than this. We know our power comes from us, the people, standing united as one to bring on the change we need. Community and non-violent mass organizing are our key to surviving this moment of rising terror. 🤝 Together we can build a future that doesn’t include destruction and death, and one where we have everything we need. That’s where you come in, Peter. You have the power to bring your next door neighbors, classmates, and family members together to organize for an abundant future. 📣 Come learn and be in community! — Ximena and the United We Dream team | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Dystopian
subject: Trump EPA lets businesses kill people to boost profits
body:
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001egnTPXoiWd9xdFMVp-3Iex-0U9GLsj6L6WoljG_krL9cefFWJK5IygGqoD_h03sQGp_8QWMVjHF8_Aeywb0u_3UVgSF0k9SYcAweOZdil6lK9Uv_qfNIHeUv8LdJThIxOHmnmHf_HhwYlH3cbWxwYgmqAGsK-YD9dSccEEJ8l0-SUyTtD0BJSxgGfwv_Exu4gnPC6S90xtL9DdElA5hbdkvG1ScQxMfj&c=Kq81gEww6ZqUS8oIUW9jtYcF_1I1IEaSPlh3BKaZRIV7isum_vMULg==&ch=6jeOMkN6MH6lg7wtjOCkmcXrJardgYk9rkntzqC7LsJ6Rq6VfbZutQ==)
---
|
Peter,
Today the Environmental Protection Agency made a bonechilling announcement that it will no longer calculate how many lives can be saved and only the cost to business when deciding pollution limits:
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001egnTPXoiWd9xdFMVp-3Iex-0U9GLsj6L6WoljG_krL9cefFWJK5IygGqoD_h03sQGp_8QWMVjHF8_Aeywb0u_3UVgSF0k9SYcAweOZdil6lK9Uv_qfNIHeUv8LdJThIxOHmnmHf_HhwYlH3cbWxwYgmqAGsK-YD9dSccEEJ8l0-SUyTtD0BJSxgGfwv_Exu4gnPC6S90xtJ6yjIJNdx1OCrGkrwZGEJj&c=Kq81gEww6ZqUS8oIUW9jtYcF_1I1IEaSPlh3BKaZRIV7isum_vMULg==&ch=6jeOMkN6MH6lg7wtjOCkmcXrJardgYk9rkntzqC7LsJ6Rq6VfbZutQ==)
---
This is stuff straight out of dystopian fiction novels.
Studies show that upwards to 200,000 people a year die prematurely from pollution related illnesses and that's under the current rules.
The EPA is effectively now allowing businesses to conduct mass murder to boost profits.
This is what happens when corporations and billionaires capture our government. And they move forward with these acts of violence because they know their kids won't be the ones to die from the consequences of their actions.
The poor, communities of color, and other marginalized people are at higher risk of pollution-related illnesses. And that's intentional. It's all by design. Subjecting people to deadly pollution is a policy decision. These are the people they are willing to sacrifice at the altar of late-stage, dystopian capitalism.
Illinois' 9th Congressional District is one of the most diverse districts in the entire country and is above the US average when it comes to air pollution. This is an attack on our community. The people need a champion who will fight for clean air and against corporate polluters. That's what environmental justice means, and that's what I'll do when I get to Congress.
But first, I need to defeat the billionaires and corporations circling this race like vultures, looking to buy this seat and prop up their chosen candidate who will serve them, not the people. It is going to take everything we have to defeat them.
Peter[, I need a surge of grassroots support to take on corporate interests who are trying to buy this seat so they can continue to boost their profits by literally killing people. Will you rush a donation of $25, $15, or whatever you can spare to help take our fight from the streets of Chicago to the halls of Congress?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001egnTPXoiWd9xdFMVp-3Iex-0U9GLsj6L6WoljG_krL9cefFWJK5IygGqoD_h03sQL-VR6IorTZp7Mk7qPhVMOPBiaM4iNU64cGhC0IqJI7fjVVAmbpyiuC7lmiB8peIinH-ioAA7UsDqTz-_sOQKzkdFNooILHHPM2AYzFBsPtNI6ynajDjUhsNP3gWei3KL2Fh8UmWYD56LPAgOO9GZ33JMS7HImePECRaITNAHlBQ=&c=Kq81gEww6ZqUS8oIUW9jtYcF_1I1IEaSPlh3BKaZRIV7isum_vMULg==&ch=6jeOMkN6MH6lg7wtjOCkmcXrJardgYk9rkntzqC7LsJ6Rq6VfbZutQ==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Today the Environmental Protection Agency made a bonechilling announcement that it will no longer calculate how many lives can be saved and only the cost to business when deciding pollution limits: | == This is stuff straight out of dystopian fiction novels. Studies show that upwards to 200,000 people a year die prematurely from pollution related illnesses and that's under the current rules. The EPA is effectively now allowing businesses to conduct mass murder to boost profits. This is what happens when corporations and billionaires capture our government. And they move forward with these acts of violence because they know their kids won't be the ones to die from the consequences of their actions. The poor, communities of color, and other marginalized people are at higher risk of pollution-related illnesses. And that's intentional. It's all by design. Subjecting people to deadly pollution is a policy decision. These are the people they are willing to sacrifice at the altar of late-stage, dystopian capitalism. Illinois' 9th Congressional District is one of the most diverse districts in the entire country and is above the US average when it comes to air pollution. This is an attack on our community. The people need a champion who will fight for clean air and against corporate polluters. That's what environmental justice means, and that's what I'll do when I get to Congress. But first, I need to defeat the billionaires and corporations circling this race like vultures, looking to buy this seat and prop up their chosen candidate who will serve them, not the people. It is going to take everything we have to defeat them. Peter== | If you've stored you information with ActBlue, we'll process your donation immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | In solidarity, | == Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-9 | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

Look, I’ll always be transparent with you, Derek.

This is an internal deadline. It’s one my team and I set to make sure we’re on track to meet our monthly expenses and prepare our campaign for what could be a tough and expensive fight this year.

So, candidly, if we miss this deadline, we will be okay. Our fight will continue on as planned.

But the reality is, it will make it harder to stay on track for February, and then in March, when we close the books on the quarter and file our next public fundraising report. **And,_if_ this pattern continues, we will need to look at our budget and decide where to scale back on our planned investments.**

[_**So I’m only asking for your help right now because it’s important. Will you donate $5, $10, or whatever makes sense for you? I’m hoping you can help us turn the month around.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123196865/594666236/-1720966344?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_TransparencyRS_260112_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTFkYTY2NS1mNWVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZGoZycU42ZKu0I-pCAdkNFpjR4Ypbz3PAT9wNyiqj6o=)

Whether or not you donate today, please know you’re a valued member of my team. It’s going to take all of us doing what we can to keep Virginia blue and flip the balance of power in Washington.

The fight continues,

Mark **Before you go:**

Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters.

clean_body: Let me explain why I’m asking for your help | | | = Derek – those of you who know me well know I’m a numbers guy. I spent my early career investing in tech startups – and I’ve spent my years in public service finding innovative ways to bring more business and federal investments to the Commonwealth. So I know a thing or two about following the money. And it’s why I make sure to keep a close eye on our campaign budget and fundraising projections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Look, I’ll always be transparent with you, Derek. This is an internal deadline. It’s one my team and I set to make sure we’re on track to meet our monthly expenses and prepare our campaign for what could be a tough and expensive fight this year. So, candidly, if we miss this deadline, we will be okay. Our fight will continue on as planned. But the reality is, it will make it harder to stay on track for February, and then in March, when we close the books on the quarter and file our next public fundraising report. And,if this pattern continues, we will need to look at our budget and decide where to scale back on our planned investments. = Whether or not you donate today, please know you’re a valued member of my team. It’s going to take all of us doing what we can to keep Virginia blue and flip the balance of power in Washington. The fight continues, Mark Before you go: Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters. And they know that there’s no Senate majority for Democrats without Virginia. =****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123196972/594666394/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWEwZTY2ZS1mNmVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5hUY6z7e-mbT2YUOLv2USaIUH4K5nPtdcjRKF99OKE=)

Peter, someone should really explain to Mariannette Miller-Meeks that actions speak louder than words.

Because last week she said this:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123196973/594666395/-2011951990?refcode=em26_260112_MM1_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260112_MM1_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=51a0e66e-f6ef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWEwZTY2ZS1mNmVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5hUY6z7e-mbT2YUOLv2USaIUH4K5nPtdcjRKF99OKE=)
After...

🚩 Voting YES on the largest Medicaid cut in history — leaving over 100,000 Iowans without healthcare and dealing a debilitating blow to rural hospitals.

🚩 Sticking with her party during a 43 day shutdown while refusing to find a solution for Iowa families who are about to see their insurance premiums double or event triple. Every single time, she voted against extending the Affordable Care Act Tax Credits.

🚩 Voting NO on a bill that lowered prices of ten life-saving medications by 62% thanks to her connections with big pharma.

🚩 Releasing the "Lower Health Care Premiums for All Americans Act," a piece of legislation that was only created to look like a solution but that **most experts agree would do _nothing to actually lower costs._**

Iowans deserve better than cheap lip service and a representative who throws them under the bus at every turn. For too long, Mariannette Miller-Meeks has abandoned Iowans as soon as her party or her donors asked her to. Christina is ready to step up for the people of Iowa and be a leader who talks the talk and walks the walk in Washington.

clean_body: Christina is ready to step up for the people of Iowa and be a leader who talks the talk and walks the walk in Washington. | = Peter, someone should really explain to Mariannette Miller-Meeks that actions speak louder than words. Because last week she said this: = After... 🚩 Voting YES on the largest Medicaid cut in history — leaving over 100,000 Iowans without healthcare and dealing a debilitating blow to rural hospitals. 🚩 Sticking with her party during a 43 day shutdown while refusing to find a solution for Iowa families who are about to see their insurance premiums double or event triple. Every single time, she voted against extending the Affordable Care Act Tax Credits. 🚩 Voting NO on a bill that lowered prices of ten life-saving medications by 62% thanks to her connections with big pharma. 🚩 Releasing the "Lower Health Care Premiums for All Americans Act," a piece of legislation that was only created to look like a solution but that most experts agree would do nothing to actually lower costs. Iowans deserve better than cheap lip service and a representative who throws them under the bus at every turn. For too long, Mariannette Miller-Meeks has abandoned Iowans as soon as her party or her donors asked her to. Christina is ready to step up for the people of Iowa and be a leader who talks the talk and walks the walk in Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation name: Stop MAGA
subject: Democrats need to bring a gun to a gun fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:
They are trying to steal an election, and we’re just not going to stand back and let that happen. Retaliate by ensuring MAGA loses CO.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zOAJ_2XyihlV2ra1gsnrgRVQq-VhmKAfHaT6tusiU7SltMfEMzt13fbgmhYQRdosPbTUIuDBUew9dTD61jvMmTnPp7lbGFa_6sqF1COC6fiAsUOG7X6Tx3ipXQbo1aOd8l48pcxglKroUg5XwIx974K0RP1CWrvnETeUWouWBftJYUCo5PQNsKl5cKtOMFJl4RXiPQ5Lu1Fz9o9SJtUWNQ==&c=962OklEAV-NV6OEW_sVoIxWhyQyHDlPQO1YXgI5ep2_WcdasUMkXmw==&ch=1fRMwHk5i7Q9rDcIvqFYhTdU-npl8UcAR4uXqZO9k9TBO7GGjjsLkg==)
---
Peter,
Last week Florida Governor Ron Desantis announced an emergency session to redistrict the FL Congressional map and remove the majority of FL's democratic seats.
The move was a last ditch measure to shore up the GOP majority following the sudden death of Congressman LaMalfa (R-CA) whose passing, along with the resignation of MTG and the defection of Congressman Massie, has brought the GOP majority to effectively just one vote.
Speaking to a reporter on Desantis' unprecedented move to eliminate Florida Democrats off of the map, Nikki Fried, the chair of the Florida Democratic party said: "They are trying to steal an election, and we're just not going to stand back and let that happen. Democrats are going to have to bring a gun to a gunfight. "
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zOAJ_2XyihlV2ra1gsnrgRVQq-VhmKAfHaT6tusiU7SltMfEMzt13fbgmhYQRdosPbTUIuDBUew9dTD61jvMmTnPp7lbGFa_6sqF1COC6fiAsUOG7X6Tx3ipXQbo1aOd8l48pcxglKroUg5XwIx974K0RP1CWrvnETeUWouWBftJYUCo5PQNsKl5cKtOMFJl4RXiPQ5Lu1GZ38fQLZNz3A==&c=962OklEAV-NV6OEW_sVoIxWhyQyHDlPQO1YXgI5ep2_WcdasUMkXmw==&ch=1fRMwHk5i7Q9rDcIvqFYhTdU-npl8UcAR4uXqZO9k9TBO7GGjjsLkg==)
---
Short of the FL Supreme Court blocking the new maps (unlikely), it is too late for Democrats to save Florida. However, by removing red seats in blue states we can "bring a gun to a gun fight" and blunt MAGA's redistricting edge ensuring the new seats they pick up in Florida are negated.
Our best shot of doing this right now is in Colorado where Republicans make up half of the Congressional delegation of this deep blue state.
Colorado Draws the Line is introducing and campaigning for the ballot initiative that will give Coloradans the chance to stand up to MAGA by erasing 3-4 GOP districts (including Boebert's district CO-04) off the CO Congressional map. But it isn't going to be easy.
We need an influx of support to help us continue to grow the momentum of this critical effort. [Can you rush a contribution to our ballot measure committee and help us get new maps on the ballot for Colorado? Our average donation is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. The amount doesn't matter; just donate what you can because it all adds up. ](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zOAJ_2XyihlV2ra1gsnrgRVQq-VhmKAfHaT6tusiU7SltMfEMzt13fbgmhYQRdosCMbbQ2lxm6W2EbKl3oxCwXZ5fu2B6u42kSzMFUobr-CWsgpLwdTYHFg8lvaDzTOlusZ_VTi9bzMOMMWmMvKzSI8TmW42lCjWC78iuHF4trS-A7_SFIj79LZ8mUalT7oIgo9P-dGVj6eLQgdijA6pLkoSmWtpv3bC&c=962OklEAV-NV6OEW_sVoIxWhyQyHDlPQO1YXgI5ep2_WcdasUMkXmw==&ch=1fRMwHk5i7Q9rDcIvqFYhTdU-npl8UcAR4uXqZO9k9TBO7GGjjsLkg==)

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I’m supporting Mandela Barnes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
I’m thrilled to support Mandela Barnes for Governor
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.E30PSJ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_011226_B1_Stacey&t=2&akid=5769%2E196590%2E6EInDi) Hi there, it’s Stacey Abrams. **I wanted to share this news with you: I am thrilled to be supporting Mandela Barnes for Governor of Wisconsin.**[Can I count on you to chip in $15 or $27 to keep up the energy for this campaign?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.E30PSJ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_011226_B1_Stacey&t=3&akid=5769%2E196590%2E6EInDi) People all across the country are looking for leaders that have what it takes to show Americans that democracy - done right - really can deliver. **In Wisconsin, Mandela Barnes is the right person for the job.** My friend Mandela is ready to tackle the hard challenges on Day One: standing up for small businesses and family farms, expanding BadgerCare, and lowering housing costs so people can actually afford to stay in Wisconsin. Mandela is committed not only to fighting for the needs of working people, but also to ensuring their values are actually represented through fair maps. From Georgia to Wisconsin, gerrymandering has taken away the people’s voice — and Mandela’s support for people-centered districts only makes this campaign even more important to preserving our democracy. [Will you stand with me in supporting Mandela in this critical race?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.E30PSJ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_011226_B1_Stacey&t=4&akid=5769%2E196590%2E6EInDi) There will be some tough battles ahead of us this year. Mandela’s vision is exactly the kind of bold leadership Wisconsinites deserve, and he has the experience to deliver real results. I hope you’ll join me in supporting his campaign. _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6683?amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_011226_B1_Stacey&t=5&akid=5769%2E196590%2E6EInDi)

From Georgia to Wisconsin, gerrymandering has taken away the people’s voice — and Mandela’s support for people-centered districts only makes this campaign even more important to preserving our democracy. There will be some tough battles ahead of us this year. Mandela’s vision is exactly the kind of bold leadership Wisconsinites deserve, and he has the experience to deliver real results. I hope you’ll join me in supporting his campaign. Team,
We're a few days away from our mid-month fundraising goal — an important benchmark for us to hit to stay on track in this race.Jocelyn has what it takes to win the race for Michigan governor.
If you're ready to help us reach our goal of rallying 130 more grassroots supporters by Jan 15, **[please use this link to pitch in and help us hit our goal!](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12026.Dfun4A&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20260112_PM2_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1329%2E181023%2EpoP961)**

Grassroots donations from folks like you power our work to elect Jocelyn as the next governor of Michigan. They give us the resources we need to:
🤝 Hire staff to build out our organizing team.
📋 Talk with local voters about what matters most to them.
📘 Train volunteers to collect signatures to get Jocelyn on the ballot!
🪧 Share Jocelyn’s message across the state!
Look, we know how _competitive_ this race is. Elections in Michigan are often won or lost by the smallest of margins.
So we’re really counting on supporters like you to help us win this race.
**[This is why our team has set a goal of recruiting 130 more grassroots donations before our mid-month deadline. So what do you say? name: Roy Cooper
subject: Asking because I have to, not because I want to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I wouldn’t be here without you.
Peter,
There have been some hard days during my career working to serve North Carolina.
Days when we couldn’t get done the things we set out to accomplish. Days that we couldn’t stop far-right legislation from hurting our people.
But there have been many, many more days when we were able to make a difference together. Expanding Medicaid. Getting some raises for public school teachers. Paid parental leave. Bringing good-paying jobs to the state. _Those achievements matter._
There are hard days on the campaign trail, too. This is a competitive race, and the national GOP is aligned against us, trying to stop us from flipping this seat blue for the first time since 2008. Earlier this month, Donald Trump even called me out at one of his rallies.
On the hardest days, knowing that you’re with me helps me keep up the fight. And no matter what, I am reminded that the opportunity to serve is itself the greatest privilege.
Our nation deserves leaders who care about more than personal pride or party loyalty. Leaders who are ready to do real work, not just play petty grievance politics. The opportunity to fight for you as the next Senator from North Carolina would be an honor I could never repay — but I will spend every day trying.
**[I wouldn’t ask for even more support from you unless it was urgent, and right now, it really is. Our mid-January fundraising deadline is January 15th, and we’re still short of our goal. Please, split a donation between our campaign and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99353?refcode=em20260112-9929&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9929%2E614464%2EEXsZZC)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99353?refcode=em20260112-9929&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9929%2E614464%2EEXsZZC)**
Thank you,
Roy Cooper

Adaleia Cross Was a Top Athlete in Her Sport. Then a Boy Joined the Team. [](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/VLXjesGDrOSLnsfOeFeZuD9fd2ghx8aU5yEZ0SFA8vEcg7bw0rqxajDRl5dJ7ZSffVt2elMhwrEtHfzpMXic0hLfMzl4jqtTm7o0Nu2UOqmEnqElZxPFmlHJHXOt9_ZU6rvG6QrjIxbvGdX9fkPGviQeNoloLXAyx8j7eifffNnZ4PMi4vCFZcGxIGimTlfRj7fv51LvQCPf2iPRYkw39_zmCrg9ZtKvtD_5JLEhs4bAr4y5D6wJ1ETFFEN-qtJi3-rutHTtPZvqZpSTjsL0_YCAzpPZoArT9z89GsSOWM8TpViK553V-zpQHFz8Idaj7LJFjGhF1F0358vYW-Aj-HKgDBKriypo00FkQxPqDnyrhn8k8NQ4KCA8Aa3wpfb1CO1FLK4dapQeYedvFIbE69MBmkoxMj7uD1zEV1zB-WxCp-M4Wa6tgcRiiLVbmeSVQuekNx4ZS8w9R5HIDCXDgfg_uTEpvBnwOrRTknx-4S9kYya3NFisAoPnnhgdUwJKIm_HArjQwsWdC0btfNrkakvwl73Mywm98p0MbttX75Q4BomyEi0OaOgiKGzzMZzS2kGrg3WukndF9HWYCF0xdyJBpUvFKmn_pGLVyuKwX_9cCWQvRKs5UIexQw366EKPzFPOrsScZHhnZQKs2bCJ_GYWdhRVKk3gKqihyOzv0LV9PLpttXlGX5uOEsy6vaJ3PFgSOOaANNCAdJpbjtm5XhmABP0hQlqulHC2D4npp2O2ccOt-QeGdcJVMVqwgJhbog/6GspDHLkPXLN4szagS4s1V6qD4eY-QX6/16) Dear Friend of Truth,

When Adaleia Cross was in seventh grade, a male student joined her school's girls' track and field team.

Her home state of West Virginia had passed a Save Women's Sports Act in 2021. But the ACLU challenged the law, and a court ruled that the male student could compete on the girls' team as the case continued.

Adaleia is an exceptional athlete. **But she 's no match for a male.**

Even though he was nearly two years younger than Adaleia, he dominated on the field, even bumping her from her spot in a championship.

It wasn't just Adaleia either. This boy displaced female athletes in competitions _at least 1,100 times_.

On top of this was the harassment.

In the locker room, the girls' bathroom, on the field--this male student made incredibly vulgar comments toward Adaleia, repeatedly. She told her parents, who reported it to the school. _But the school did nothing to protect Adaleia_.

This is what happens when lies are heralded as truth. When our schools, legislatures, and courts side with gender ideology, **_girls get hurt_.**

But here's the good news--in less than one week, Adaleia and girls nationwide will finally get their day in court. **The very case that enabled this male student to keep competing on the girls ' team is now at the U.S. Supreme Court.**

A victory in this case would secure laws like West Virginia's that protect girls' sports and loosen the hold of gender ideology on our culture.

And, most of all, it would signal to girls and young women everywhere that fair play and safety for each one of them matters.

clean_body: Adaleia Cross Was a Top Athlete in Her Sport. Then a Boy Joined the Team. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | Adaleia Cross Was a Top Athlete in Her Sport. Then a Boy Joined the Team. Dear Friend of Truth, When Adaleia Cross was in seventh grade, a male student joined her school's girls' track and field team. Her home state of West Virginia had passed a Save Women's Sports Act in 2021. But the ACLU challenged the law, and a court ruled that the male student could compete on the girls' team as the case continued. Adaleia is an exceptional athlete. But she 's no match for a male. Even though he was nearly two years younger than Adaleia, he dominated on the field, even bumping her from her spot in a championship. It wasn't just Adaleia either. This boy displaced female athletes in competitions at least 1,100 times. On top of this was the harassment. In the locker room, the girls' bathroom, on the field--this male student made incredibly vulgar comments toward Adaleia, repeatedly. She told her parents, who reported it to the school. But the school did nothing to protect Adaleia. This is what happens when lies are heralded as truth. When our schools, legislatures, and courts side with gender ideology, girls get hurt. But here's the good news--in less than one week, Adaleia and girls nationwide will finally get their day in court. The very case that enabled this male student to keep competing on the girls ' team is now at the U.S. Supreme Court. A victory in this case would secure laws like West Virginia's that protect girls' sports and loosen the hold of gender ideology on our culture. And, most of all, it would signal to girls and young women everywhere that fair play and safety for each one of them matters. For truth, Alliance Defending Freedom Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

subject: I ran toward the war
body:
| | | [](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=b74befe5808d4118890b9371bbd07962&_e=0AWzs72CFz1Tlnt66zqyT99NLmdGIeX84jCWHe3DzRDi-Y2etiosMDVSMBAIFYQEx-NCdlII9WsBlPJx56gyYfOZj1BZVYO_6S2SS9zyxJXVWLPNiKtcfSbcWqVb4kYPkp7KOE0YchrocNuIjZDrpypmehHYvvnL5rCxkGHZ--GnV3gPyZifc_eJv86KJXUJHNZWZ1d1CBeMMIN7eNKXY7fzi0xQZYDUbXVDGlXS7YbjwuuR_gMNP6G0RtMDCMLehMfS1CmcpemGxOYKjzoTzK8SxTaqaMxzqoFgRycV71QlbHbMSKFdb5nLkYfjaMuNbmvnGMJoG1sq6--Uwpz4Xi8Z854TxWf4og1mAErWH824ttdgu2LAbCS8E2mg3PJwQJ9NVRW08GHpZd7T0ScKpPgROaSusOGUXC_Jc1bUesUXgTS0v7Lh-TKdqDpLSLWMgTSp1s4ThYiGoqw29dpPr4uJnzcTafPkBWYuNuKlcqiyIqPNSssOV5okXiHqevqU7-_h_AhW7jnFewFI4Lu_aLu_QkQyZrYBXNMeIFKKoALILCHNYcp0eQ_RzuywTgWB)
---
When the 12 day war broke out in the Middle East, I was already on my way out of Iraq. I had just landed in Kuwait when the missiles started flying. I was given the option: to _leave the country and come back to the U.S._ **I didn’t. My friends and my country needed me.** As airspace shut down and the region moved closer to full-scale war, I turned around and fought my way back into Iraq. I went straight to a colonel and asked to stay. When that wasn’t enough, I found another way. _Because when Americans are in danger, you don’t run from the fight — you move toward it._ A week later, the war ended. Our base was not attacked. Not because the threat wasn’t real — but because our enemies believed that if they touched any Americans, the response would be overwhelming. That’s peace through strength. Not a slogan. A fact. **I’m Captain Mike Bouchard — Iraq veteran, Army Paratrooper, Bronze Star recipient — and I’m running for Congress because America needs leaders who don’t hesitate when it matters.** Washington has plenty of people who talk tough when it’s easy and disappear when it’s hard. **I’m not one of them.** **[If you believe strength keeps the peace — and weakness invites chaos — I’m asking you to stand with me.](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=b74befe5808d4118890b9371bbd07962&_e=0AWzs72CFz1Tlnt66zqyT99NLmdGIeX84jCWHe3DzRDi-Y2etiosMDVSMBAIFYQEx-NCdlII9WsBlPJx56gyYfOZj1BZVYO_6S2SS9zyxJXVWLPNiKtcfSbcWqVb4kYPkp7KOE0YchrocNuIjZDrpypmehHYvvnL5rCxkGHZ--GnV3gPyZifc_eJv86KJXUJHNZWZ1d1CBeMMIN7eNKXY7fzi0xQZYDUbXVDGlXS7YZmOSjDFWN-xdN5UoxfVnhRy6MwOqjJUAOKYcII4Kt6352iDyK7BF3jHy62hdU3uOzSvUyDh7Psa1-vK_OcG_dQ1aEddnli5zRHvxJm23-RTIgHBmUZIsXGDNbvxvNe-jrQ0p--w65sbE3sAzUvfHZ_f6YpXBCuopPDWPX6WygFyV41xzLTrofplOeOB6rGDT1GWDD4WefsORgX0fYxvLjIm_0w5-xjLU0FLoVoXTbD8-ylIzq7CJTLRIUAub1Cm-usrSZCKMKSTdtve8TJZsGzblSRI430rR-W83SrJ09v3p9bM8N3kw6i46wJAPJLo2vwoRTd8OfYml2hh7Nk9Jld)**

name: Mary Peltola
subject: I am running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101132?t=6&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu) Hello -

My name is Mary Peltola, and I want to share with you why I've made the decision to run for the United States Senate in Alaska — and to ask for your support as we begin this journey together.

But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to split a contribution today:

[**vpproject.us/founding-donor**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101132?t=7&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101132?t=8&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu)
---
Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision.

When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance.

Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity.

Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find.

So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just crushing Alaska families.

And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. _They don’t even believe us._

They're focused on their own wallets — not ours.

And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest.

It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted.

I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home.

Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford.

Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again.

My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning.

But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption.

I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future.

**This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race... and that is together.**

So I am asking:

[**Please contribute to my campaign for the U.S. Senate and the Voter Protection Project today to become a Founding Donor. We are looking for a huge number of day one donors to get our campaign off to a strong start and put us in a position to win. No donation is too small. They will all add up fast.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101132?t=9&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mary Peltola and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101133?t=10&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101134?t=11&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101135?t=12&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101136?t=13&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101132?t=14&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu)
Thank you,

Mary
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu)

[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=22584%2E878179%2E4gEKVu)

clean_body: | | | Friend - My name is Mary Peltola, and I want to share with you why I've made the decision to run for the United States Senate in Alaska — and to ask for your support as we begin this journey together. But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to split a contribution today: | Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision. When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance. Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity. Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find. So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just crushing Alaska families. And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. They don’t even believe us. They're focused on their own wallets — not ours. And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest. It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted. I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home. Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford. Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again. My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning. But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption. I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future. This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race... and that is together. So I am asking: **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thank you, Mary elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. _**By David Shuster**_
The killing of Renee Good in Minneapolis would be grim enough if it were merely another case of an armed government officer viewing a woman, driving away, as a threat. But in the Trump administration, where there is no apparent bottom for moral degradation, the tragedy has been multiplied by right-wing liars, demagogues, and constitutional illiterates.
Let's begin with the facts. Renee Good was shot by an ICE agent.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0149fb35-8e4f-49f2-8911-2a562dbeb89a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Multiple videos show she was turning away when the bullets struck her. No credible evidence has surfaced that she posed a lethal threat at the moment she was killed. That alone should provoke somber investigations.
Instead, President Trump, whose relationship with the truth is practically non-existent, declared the deceased woman had been "a professional agitator," "a radical," and that she had run over the ICE agent and deserved to be shot.
Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem, a politician whose chief qualification appears to be an unshakable devotion to theatrical cruelty, upped the ante, branding the incident "domestic terrorism."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0149fb35-8e4f-49f2-8911-2a562dbeb89a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But the real jewel in this crown of Trump administration insanity belongs to Vice President J. D. Vance.
He announced with great solemnity that federal law-enforcement officers enjoy "absolute immunity."
Vance's declaration is not merely wrong; it is ludicrous. There is no such doctrine in American law. None. It exists only in the fever dreams of fascist wannabes who mistake their own wishes for jurisprudence.
* * *
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.EQOzN_6ch42UdTm7yUX4jkfjfWlq8voqAu4zD-A28Mo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=184079731)
* * *
In the United States, law enforcement officers enjoy _qualified_ immunity -- a legal contrivance already generous to the point of absurdity. However, even that does not shield police -- at any level -- from criminal prosecution. There is no constitutional clause or court ruling that grants federal agents the right to kill citizens without consequence. That privilege has been reserved, historically speaking, for secret police, death squads, and the uniformed bullies of authoritarian states -- the sort of regimes that enforce order not by law, but by fear.
Yet here we are, with a U.S. Vice President casually asserting that the administration's hired guns are above the law -- that once an ICE badge is awarded, accountability evaporates, the courts are irrelevant, and everybody in the United States is reduced to livestock.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0149fb35-8e4f-49f2-8911-2a562dbeb89a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This is the development that should alarm everybody across the political spectrum, even people who feel no affection for Renee Good or for immigrants, activists, or any of the other Trump enemies of the month. The issue is not sympathy. The issue is power. A government that insists its agents may kill first and explain later -- or not explain at all -- is a government that has abandoned any pretense of liberty.
Throughout our history, American men and women have repeatedly fought wars to rid themselves of such doctrines. But today, MAGA men and women, parroting the Trump-Vance talking points, embrace tyranny without a second thought.
These defenders of the shooting insist that we must "trust law enforcement."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0149fb35-8e4f-49f2-8911-2a562dbeb89a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
That's interesting. Because trust is what you offer in the absence of verification. And verification is clearly what the Trump administration is trying to avoid. Whether it's economic data, the Epstein files, or forensics from this ICE shooting, the Trump team does not want an investigation; they want obedience. They do not want facts; they want silence. And when silence fails, Trump and his goons will happily promote lies.
* * *
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=184079731&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg0MDc5NzMxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjgyNTM3ODEsImV4cCI6MTc3MDg0NTc4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Kr1bQnNidReCTKQju8OqR8j9QdzGP8bz2qeFGVv65kc)
* * *
Minnesota officials, to their credit, have balked at swallowing the federal story whole. They have asked for transparency, independent review, and evidence -- those old-fashioned nuisances that authoritarianism finds so irritating.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0149fb35-8e4f-49f2-8911-2a562dbeb89a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For this, the Minnesota leaders -- from the Governor to the Minneapolis Mayor to the city's police chief -- have been scolded, smeared, and treated as traitors to the cult of the Trump badge.
This is what it has all become: a cult. A belief that uniforms confer moral purity, guns confer wisdom, and members of ICE, DHS/Border Security, the Military, etc., are absolved in advance of whatever they do, simply if they are doing what Trump wants. It is a theology well suited to intellectually challenged people who prefer force over thought and slogans over law.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0149fb35-8e4f-49f2-8911-2a562dbeb89a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=184079731&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg0MDc5NzMxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjgyNTM3ODEsImV4cCI6MTc3MDg0NTc4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Kr1bQnNidReCTKQju8OqR8j9QdzGP8bz2qeFGVv65kc&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)
* * *
Renee Good is dead. No press conference will resurrect her, and no rhetoric will cleanse the stain of her killing. But the greater danger is not in the ICE action or bullets that ended her life, but in the doctrine now being peddled to excuse the killing - the doctrine that Trump/Vance agents are sovereign and citizens are secondary.
This sort of doctrine, throughout history, has never ended well. It is the doctrine of empires in decline, of republics that have forgotten why they were founded, and of governments that mistake fear for strength.
The tragedy in Minneapolis is not only that a woman was killed. It is that so many Trump administration leaders and their right-wing political/media sycophants rushed forward to argue why her death doesn't matter - and why next time, yours might not either.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0149fb35-8e4f-49f2-8911-2a562dbeb89a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

How Trump, Vance, and ICE are normalizing a doctrine of state violence that has no place in American law | | and | Jan 12 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- By David Shuster The killing of Renee Good in Minneapolis would be grim enough if it were merely another case of an armed government officer viewing a woman, driving away, as a threat. But in the Trump administration, where there is no apparent bottom for moral degradation, the tragedy has been multiplied by right-wing liars, demagogues, and constitutional illiterates. Let's begin with the facts. Renee Good was shot by an ICE agent. | | ---|---|--- Multiple videos show she was turning away when the bullets struck her. No credible evidence has surfaced that she posed a lethal threat at the moment she was killed. That alone should provoke somber investigations. Instead, President Trump, whose relationship with the truth is practically non-existent, declared the deceased woman had been "a professional agitator," "a radical," and that she had run over the ICE agent and deserved to be shot. Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem, a politician whose chief qualification appears to be an unshakable devotion to theatrical cruelty, upped the ante, branding the incident "domestic terrorism." | | ---|---|--- But the real jewel in this crown of Trump administration insanity belongs to Vice President J. D. Vance. He announced with great solemnity that federal law-enforcement officers enjoy "absolute immunity." Vance's declaration is not merely wrong; it is ludicrous. In the United States, law enforcement officers enjoy qualified immunity -- a legal contrivance already generous to the point of absurdity. However, even that does not shield police -- at any level -- from criminal prosecution. There is no constitutional clause or court ruling that grants federal agents the right to kill citizens without consequence. That privilege has been reserved, historically speaking, for secret police, death squads, and the uniformed bullies of authoritarian states -- the sort of regimes that enforce order not by law, but by fear. My name is Mary Peltola, and I want to share with you why I've made the decision to run for the United States Senate in Alaska — and to ask for your support as we begin this journey together.

But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to split a contribution today:

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_lbr_fr_peltola-launch_q12026/founding-donor**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123198194/594670719/-1258440894?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.12_Peltola-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mjc2YjVjYS1mYWVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rW2kaod4dMODU5z5-KKezcDwNKurnno5Rta732tHQsk=) | | [ CONTRIBUTE » ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123198195/594670720/-1258440894?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.12_Peltola-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mjc2YjVjYS1mYWVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rW2kaod4dMODU5z5-KKezcDwNKurnno5Rta732tHQsk=)
---
Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision.

When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance.

Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity.

Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find.

So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just _crushing_ Alaska families.

And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. _They don’t even believe us._

They're focused on their own wallets — not ours.

And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest.

It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted.

I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home.

Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford.

Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again.

My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning.

But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption.

I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future.

**This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race... and that is together.**

So I am asking:

[**Please contribute to my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Lisa Blunt Rochester today to become a Founding Donor. We are looking for a huge number of day one donors to get our campaign off to a strong start and put us in a position to win. No donation is too small. They will all add up fast.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123198196/594670721/-1258440894?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.12_Peltola-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mjc2YjVjYS1mYWVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rW2kaod4dMODU5z5-KKezcDwNKurnno5Rta732tHQsk=)

clean_body: You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, To unsubscribe, | | = = Hello - My name is Mary Peltola, and I want to share with you why I've made the decision to run for the United States Senate in Alaska — and to ask for your support as we begin this journey together. But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to split a contribution today: = | | = Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision. When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance. Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity. Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find. So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just crushing Alaska families. And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. They don’t even believe us. They're focused on their own wallets — not ours. And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest. It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted. I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home. Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford. Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again. My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning. But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption. I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future. This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race... and that is together. So I am asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Lisa Blunt Rochester and Mary Peltola will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Mary | = I officially became the first woman and person of color to ever represent Delaware in the Senate. But even though our campaign is over, the work has just begun. Will you chip in any amount today to help Bright Hope take center stage in the Senate? | = = Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19809 United States | mailto:info@lisabluntrochester.com Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. name: Team Wes Moore
subject: Before it is too late
body:
Less than 36 hours to go.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1202%2E1086043%2EHiklj5)
We have less than 36 hours left before we’re legally barred from fundraising, Peter.
**[Will you chip in $5 right now? We need to be as prepared as possible for the next three months, and we’re still short.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260112-2.2xPt6n&refcode=em-20260112-2&t=2&akid=1202%2E1086043%2EHiklj5)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260112-2.2xPt6n&amount=5&refcode=em-20260112-2&t=3&akid=1202%2E1086043%2EHiklj5)**
We've built up to this moment since the start. After Wes launched his reelection campaign in September, we began a sprint that we knew would last until the Maryland General Assembly begins its session this week.
While Wes is hard at work throughout the legislative session, our team’s hands are tied. Meanwhile, Republicans are jumping in the race and aren’t impacted by that fundraising freeze.
**They’re allowed to keep cashing in large checks from wealthy donors. Meanwhile, we rely on the help of grassroots supporters like you chipping in _right now_ before we shut down our fundraising operations.**
With just hours to go, we have to ask again:
**[Please, Peter, can you chip in any amount right now? Whatever we raise before midnight tomorrow will have to sustain us for three full months, so we need your help before it’s too late.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260112-2.2xPt6n&refcode=em-20260112-2&t=4&akid=1202%2E1086043%2EHiklj5)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260112-2.2xPt6n&amount=5&refcode=em-20260112-2&t=23&akid=1202%2E1086043%2EHiklj5)**
Now is the time to make an impact, if you’re able.
Thank you,
Team Wes Moore

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20260112-2&t=24&refcode2=1202_1086043_Hiklj5&akid=1202%2E1086043%2EHiklj5)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=1202%2E1086043%2EHiklj5)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1202%2E1086043%2EHiklj5)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: David Seligman
subject: What the hell does “affordability” even mean?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seligman for AG,
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act]
Politicians love to talk about “affordability” like it’s just a poll-tested political slogan.
But the real experts on affordability are hardworking Coloradans living in an economy rigged against them–one that squeezes us dry to line the pockets of corporations and billionaires.
That’s what I talk about in our new campaign ad—and it’s why I’m running for attorney general. (You can watch the ad here.) [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act]
Groceries. Rent. Baby formula. Medication. Junk fees. Utility bills. Health care.
Making those things affordable isn’t just about prices. It’s about power .
It’s about stopping investment firms from buying up our housing, our hospitals, even our kids’ sports leagues. It’s about attacking Big Tech when they build massive AI data centers that jack up our utility bills. It’s taking on corporate landlords, shitty bosses, and union-busters.
The Colorado Attorney General can do all of that. The AG can break up monopolies, go after collusion, expose junk fees. The AG can take on corporate schemes designed to steal from workers and crush unions. And I will.
We can put the law back in everyday people’s hands and make Colorado a place where people don’t just survive but actually thrive . Where families can afford the basics. Where taking a freaking vacation isn’t a fantasy.
Join our movement to make the law work for everyday Coloradans . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act]
The same corporate interests and billionaire donors rigging the system are watching this race closely . So let’s show them what people-power can do.
If you believe affordability is about taking on corporate power and abuse, I’m asking you to chip in right now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act]
With gratitude,
David Seligman
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-affordability?refcode=x_260112_affordability1_act] As Executive Director of the nonprofit legal organization Towards Justice, David has taken on corporate giants like Amazon, Uber, and the biggest corporate landlords in the country—helping recover more than $70 million stolen from working people by powerful interests.
Now he’s running for attorney general to defend our freedoms, challenge concentrated power, and build a future where working people can thrive.
He’s already doing the work. Visit SeligmanforAG.com [https://www.seligmanforag.com] to learn more.

Fellow American,

That's how long Chuck Schumer and the radical Democrats held our government hostage to try and force _you_ to pay for free benefits for _illegal aliens_.

But our Republican majority didn't budge, we never wavered, and now Schumer is left facing a civil war amongst his _own_ party.

**There's just one problem:[despite the disastrous scenario Schumer and the Democrats now find themselves in, they still feel EMBOLDENED that they can FLIP our Senate majority in the midterms.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4d2eeef9d85f4f58a19391f2de211b44&_e=7wkso0TdPTrGrJgd-YRA7Vwk0WcwR80O_78kLPx4lfid_jUWn6AWHxxRYb4mSZ5lr2nzVkcbrnY3XQDMWyPnJWXx6emTK7El1g04nwHHDnDV8Td5nGyzGIg35LdWROQemmw3Mt7zqlmHeNJGvVswLH2PAKck46okJfbPdCfYLP6mFWCl9Go8_otoAQwU64-tflMt0P-ppwzsG1852p4FhT6WYDhR4jUTUIzHfMw5ZvPavV10h2zYrG_A0WqiT_YOCJIYUZ68cPKbfjo1LTNFDaEJKLmEDoIy3X0vET_MImN5F5b64rXyTKDdiSYMMonmDVuLruX8Ni8tM8hYBfsxk7KLnWL21hY3slHoG1GWiWkhUNTUnWOu8v0k0cpsS6wzp9JiOyQSBKoGd1InIckpQ__b53AZTNfbjYITnN81DlETXwuF48AYyQfk0ASSC8gFLMFQ2LzaHgHBcTU3sHtEKwa3m-wYfMt6eL1x4RpuZULJU7f5ajQr8FnuSqQakDIMma9u2xxHIjcczIY-0UG6-cTUD50KGpGrjXEx2O5xkHDzKEmZ5nkDnEbrGvUE21Y0_DqqyZLhMIYBHqxohE8yPVRc1R0ejdQhJRGS9ilWFRyAzpX9B60QT_Y5O1mO2zkuDPiouOvalEEJL-YuNheMjKcGpeJrGxCZ0hF1nPf3NpSxeyezqK7MMuvyPVr2mAoLHlGq_xu5zgK09SW4EBVjV02G-7TalhCw5sJ5hJFsWjLhx2eLQBimaaaRaKlSg8kdNAnmZ_MZ_OlFyxHGc4sTvB564qMszQYAjbUmfdASH-3PwvVb1Xvhcl5tsIogxfbMV6KpZCSdqLKUq1HlRW_4I7rlwmJ8rnq5lcr4RCrJQtQ%3D)**

Look, I get it. I understand your inbox is probably flooded with emails asking for donations.

**[But I promise you, this email is different.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4d2eeef9d85f4f58a19391f2de211b44&_e=7wkso0TdPTrGrJgd-YRA7Vwk0WcwR80O_78kLPx4lfid_jUWn6AWHxxRYb4mSZ5lr2nzVkcbrnY3XQDMWyPnJWXx6emTK7El1g04nwHHDnDV8Td5nGyzGIg35LdWROQemmw3Mt7zqlmHeNJGvVswLH2PAKck46okJfbPdCfYLP6mFWCl9Go8_otoAQwU64-tflMt0P-ppwzsG1852p4FhT6WYDhR4jUTUIzHfMw5ZvPavV10h2zYrG_A0WqiT_YOCJIYUZ68cPKbfjo1LTNFDaEJKLmEDoIy3X0vET_MImN5F5b64rXyTKDdiSYMMonmDVuLruX8Ni8tM8hYBfsxk1nZMDlr4Pz4i6eNdlAA5zirJEigj6nQNHZO9eOZzsdpOiDO5wg_rUhp5u6J-FqeHYxCENHjhxjn9Uq4pViLqcmhNSi5G-ZQECnOtOnqFJyZImzyD8wROk7eiHnyqB4TbHwyaaP7kyLR4E4GQzwvbWUTM8rhVMx6YOf-X4E3fHYlXDdsBgVSF9aia-r_H_O4z1vWYtU7Wt285TPE3yXC0iBLw2tZ2CBie4whImkDvq1hhyChFil3YJxL2hvhr_Wd3RH6iqWU9a2KNx5OSsHQxXcjP9wln2uM2ViNO76RsK0x4JJ8TY21fhwbs9qOYADOHRlwQSB2rl4JjsTVdG2_YKK5UpohggMbR9wtrpomHE2bArSf3fpaQ-ZOnKNt9SctyFKfxa_0R7B0OQLD2Vok_mULxmBO9LQptMceKdhLyZ2RYB1iUVJZshYdvQtTShIow5e_3QaL3R1uu-Jr_xZeWnoQ5tKp0l09eB2KiHkXTPmBpHtyaOdTaJOCl8jtduGGWEVkDsE06mROodfiM9S782o%3D)**
