clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. _Peter, this is Mazie. Mary Peltola is running for the Senate in Alaska to help us retake the majority. Please read her message below, and I hope you'll consider joining me in supporting her campaign._
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123202055/594683553/-261618493?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWExNjkxMS0wOGYwLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZrg5Jx--HRFycRuWlINmLvl-DYh0y3EpOJluJABa1o=) Peter, My name is Mary Peltola, and I want to share with you why I've made the decision to run for the United States Senate in Alaska — and to ask for your support as we begin this journey together. But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to split a contribution today: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mkh-em-peltola/founding-donor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123202058/594683557/-261618493?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWExNjkxMS0wOGYwLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZrg5Jx--HRFycRuWlINmLvl-DYh0y3EpOJluJABa1o=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123202062/594683561/-261618493?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWExNjkxMS0wOGYwLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZrg5Jx--HRFycRuWlINmLvl-DYh0y3EpOJluJABa1o=)

Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision.
When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance.
Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity.
Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find.
So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just _crushing_ Alaska families.
And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. _They don’t even believe us._
They're focused on their own wallets — not ours.
And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest.
It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted.
I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home.
Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford.
Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again.
My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning.
But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption.
I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future.
**This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race... and that is together.**
So I am asking:
**[Please contribute to my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Mazie Hirono today to become a Founding Donor. We are looking for a huge number of day one donors to get our campaign off to a strong start and put us in a position to win. No donation is too small. They will all add up fast.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123202065/594683564/-261618493?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWExNjkxMS0wOGYwLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZrg5Jx--HRFycRuWlINmLvl-DYh0y3EpOJluJABa1o=)**

clean_body: | Peter, this is Mazie. Mary Peltola is running for the Senate in Alaska to help us retake the majority. Please read her message below, and I hope you'll consider joining me in supporting her campaign. = Peter, My name is Mary Peltola, and I want to share with you why I've made the decision to run for the United States Senate in Alaska — and to ask for your support as we begin this journey together. But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to split a contribution today: = | = Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision. When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance. Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity. Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find. So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just crushing Alaska families. And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. They don’t even believe us. They're focused on their own wallets — not ours. And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest. It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted. I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home. Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford. Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again. My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning. But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption. I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future. This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race... and that is together. So I am asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mazie Hirono and Mary Peltola will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Mary Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

Peter,

During his first speech as Mayor of New York City, Mamdani promised to _" replace the frigidity of rugged individualism with the warmth of collectivism."_

But let's be clear:

That "warmth" isn't comfort.
It isn't compassion.
And it certainly isn't freedom.

_**It 's hellfire!**_

History has shown us exactly what collectivism brings: government control, crushed opportunity, and the slow erosion of everything that made America exceptional in the first place.

And now, that same radical ideology is spreading.

Mamdani's brand of "warmth" is coming to your city if we don't take a stand to defend the principles that make America the greatest country on earth!

That's why Turning Point PAC is acting NOW.

We are already funding and deploying ballot chasers in key battleground states, building the infrastructure needed to win elections -- not just this cycle, but in 2028 and beyond.

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/785dd63c-6a23-42e5-b19c-330835a9c051?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

### **Support bold independent journalism and help us replace the mainstream media by becoming a PolitiBrawl Member today:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..UIM-wJV0yxKya1jz3tOFb08fsW-gzYzI67cHoOcuRv4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=184354645)
* * *
The Renee Good case got a significant breakthrough when video taken by the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent in question was released to the public by Alpha News.
[| | | | | Alpha News
---
@AlphaNews
BREAKING: Alpha News has obtained cellphone footage showing perspective of federal agent at center of ICE-involved shooting in Minneapolis
| 5:33 PM * Jan 9, 2026 * 21.9M Views9.05K Replies * 16.3K Reposts * 54.5K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/785dd63c-6a23-42e5-b19c-330835a9c051?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## _**The video gives critical clarity ...**_
* Good and her wife knew they were interacting with ICE agents
* Good had parked their car in the middle of the road to impede the federal vehicles during an operation
* Good's wife was outside filming the interaction and antagonizing the agents
* Good was told to get out of the vehicle
* Good's wife attempted to enter their vehicle but was unable
* Good's wife shouted for her to drive off
* Good was not panicked and looked directly at the agent when she hit the gas pedal
* The agent was struck by the vehicle
* Good had her dog in the backseat

For the past few days, Democrats have tried to paint Good as simply being caught up in an operation that happened to take place after dropping her son off at school. The video makes it clear Good was keenly aware of what she was doing and to whom.
_**Piece continues after message from our sponsor ....**_
* * *
**[Together with Health Science Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/227ff86e-ab6d-45d7-90c1-8847934b036a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[RFK Jr. Just Exposed a National Brain Scandal](https://substack.com/redirect/227ff86e-ab6d-45d7-90c1-8847934b036a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/227ff86e-ab6d-45d7-90c1-8847934b036a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
RFK Jr. is finally sounding the alarm:
**Americans are being "MASS POISONED."**
And it's worse than you think...
**[Click here to see the secret](https://substack.com/redirect/227ff86e-ab6d-45d7-90c1-8847934b036a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** RFK Jr. is exposing...
And why this might be **the biggest cover-up yet.**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/227ff86e-ab6d-45d7-90c1-8847934b036a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**Piece continues ....**_
As I previously wrote, all of this could have been avoided had the pair not inserted themselves into a law enforcement operation. Not only did they put themselves in danger, but they also put their own dog in harm's way. The hubris to think nothing will happen while putting your own pet in a tense situation is something to behold.
That is _**not**_ to say the shooting is something to celebrate, rather, it should serve as a warning to others that while you can film what agents are doing, you can't interfere or attack them.
No one can reasonably expect any law enforcement officer to wait and wait as a car is coming right towards them to not do something to end the threat. Plenty of police officers have been killed or seriously injured in the line of duty because of drivers ramming their cars.
* * *
### **Support bold independent journalism and help us replace the mainstream media by becoming a PolitiBrawl Member today:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..UIM-wJV0yxKya1jz3tOFb08fsW-gzYzI67cHoOcuRv4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=184354645)
* * *
This case has basically turned into another Kyle Rittenhouse situation, where it does not matter how many videos are shown as to what happened to the ICE agents, liberals will move the goalposts or omit key facts to justify a car attack.
Many of the locals in Minneapolis are adamant ICE "murdered" Good and are not backing down from protesting despite the cold. If I had to guess, it will only be a matter of time before the energy will be too much for local or state law enforcement to contain.
* * *

body:
Together, we’re demanding an economy that puts people first. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWmecjbYzcnpbseJN9sTvu9rOoVgMFnlJu_mM7lJhtlqdUkLiYjsC1db9XMGLE3KwINL4vOWExygUJnxDZpGTr3pOdypBqprBdz0cslCkli1MJBp8BK7npMiRl6FqEPgstw6nBSQxDAK8kghZC9FUtXrsrZ1XnIE-E-wDfh5Ivb9okNoJVJ_IaY0ilKuLExc9xi-QVHdoad4OHvmc4dVp7YFzfCAzdtbwEMgVhYLRYFyt9nZkHU7Bd_vAEjtMpnjGtBeX8mNp8Zpn5LEpnj9qqgoLl1P9rh-z30JaOBC4gNB10oCfS9umnXMhJ6B2AX5yX/4n8/2ojLnW40RI-VxooT1oWOhg/h0/h001.1igeT9KlukB0MEG77lgDzdWOqqZ-ruz_LfxmJEtr6qc)
---
Friend, Late last week, thanks to your advocacy, the U.S. House of Representatives passed a three-year extension of the Affordable Care Act (ACA) premium tax credits, which have been keeping health insurance more affordable for tens of millions of people. Now it’s the Senate’s turn to act. And with 17 Republicans joining all Democrats in passing this extension through the House, we could have the momentum needed to overcome a filibuster and pass this extension in the Senate. **Note: You can still get healthcare coverage through the Affordable Care Act’s marketplace in your state, if you apply by January 15, this Thursday.** That’s the last day to enroll in or change health insurance plans, for insurance coverage that begins February 1. If you don’t have insurance and want to see how much it might cost, this open enrollment period is the time to do that.
After January 15 and until October 31, you can apply for your state’s healthcare exchange only if you qualify for special enrollment because of a life event—such as having a new baby or a new dependment, moving, losing health coverage, or getting married. If you qualify for Medicaid or the Children’s Health Insurance Program (CHIP), you can apply for coverage through those programs anytime.

Over 2,500 supporters have sent a letter to their representatives. Will you be next?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123202898/594686512/1328794144?refcode=ea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjYjRjNWI4LTBhZjAtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K4H56evgOhzDX4yqDQwtwJhKnq5bQdjyuLdj3HT_amE=&emci=c4e72aac-fdef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=4823105)

We wouldn’t reach out again if it weren’t so important. Last Thursday, the Senate voted to advance the War Powers Resolution that would block Trump from using military force in Venezuela without congressional approval. This is a significant step forward, but the fight is far from over. **The full Senate vote could happen any day now, and then it moves to the House.** Your voice matters at every stage of this fight. **Over 2,500 JanePAC supporters have**[sent letters demanding Congress pass the War Powers Resolution and stop Trump’s war for oil in Venezuela,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123202899/594686513/1797657022?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903%26ms%3Dea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&refcode=ea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjYjRjNWI4LTBhZjAtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K4H56evgOhzDX4yqDQwtwJhKnq5bQdjyuLdj3HT_amE=&emci=c4e72aac-fdef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=4823105)** but Congress hasn’t acted yet, and we need your voice in this fight.** This resolution is about drawing a clear line: no wars for oil, no unchecked executive power, no more fossil fuel greed disguised as foreign policy. We are incredibly grateful for the thousands of supporters who have already signed on — your voices are making a real difference. Now let's keep the pressure going. **[It only takes 2 minutes to send a message to Congress before it's too late.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123202900/594686514/1797657022?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903%26ms%3Dea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&refcode=ea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjYjRjNWI4LTBhZjAtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K4H56evgOhzDX4yqDQwtwJhKnq5bQdjyuLdj3HT_amE=&emci=c4e72aac-fdef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN ON**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123202901/594686516/1797657022?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903%26ms%3Dea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&refcode=ea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjYjRjNWI4LTBhZjAtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K4H56evgOhzDX4yqDQwtwJhKnq5bQdjyuLdj3HT_amE=&emci=c4e72aac-fdef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=4823105)

In solidarity,
— Team JanePAC
* * *
Remember when Donald Trump promised Big Oil executives a “great deal” if they poured $1 billion into his campaign? What happened this weekend was proof he’s making good on that promise.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123202903/594686517/1797657022?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903%26ms%3Dea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&refcode=ea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjYjRjNWI4LTBhZjAtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K4H56evgOhzDX4yqDQwtwJhKnq5bQdjyuLdj3HT_amE=&emci=c4e72aac-fdef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=4823105)
**Hours after the U.S. military carried out strikes in Venezuela and forcibly removed its president, Trump announced that the U.S. would “run the country” and take control of Venezuela’s oil.**
Without permission from Congress, without international approval, and without any public plan, Trump unilaterally ordered military action, seized a foreign head of state, and openly declared his intention to control another nation’s resources.
Let that sink in.
He wants U.S. oil companies to move in, “spend billions of dollars” to rebuild Venezuela's oil infrastructure, and start profiting from the country's resources. He even suggested deploying American troops — without asking Congress — to protect these corporate interests and “ _get the oil flowing._ ”
Jane Fonda always says, we owe it to our children and their children to demand better. Ending our dependence on oil is part of that responsibility. Fossil fuels are making people sick, releasing toxic chemicals like dioxins, benzene, and naphthalene into our air, our water, and our food. What’s unfolding now is the inevitable result of fossil fuel greed combined with unchecked executive power and reckless militarism.
This moment calls for restraint, diplomacy, and level-headed leadership. Since none of those qualities exist in the White House at this time, we must rely on Congress to act.
**The power to declare war belongs to Congress. Not the president. Not the Pentagon. Not fossil fuel executives whispering in the Oval Office.**
That’s why the U.S. Senate is preparing to vote on a War Powers Resolution that would force Trump to seek congressional approval before escalating further attacks on Venezuela.
**[This vote could happen any day, and your representative needs to hear from you right now. Click here to tell your Congressperson to help us end Trump's war-mongering by passing the War Powers Resolution >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123202904/594686518/1797657022?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903%26ms%3Dea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&refcode=ea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjYjRjNWI4LTBhZjAtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K4H56evgOhzDX4yqDQwtwJhKnq5bQdjyuLdj3HT_amE=&emci=c4e72aac-fdef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=fcb4c5b8-0af0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=4823105)**

clean_body: Over 2,500 supporters have sent a letter to their representatives. Will you be next? | We wouldn’t reach out again if it weren’t so important. Last Thursday, the Senate voted to advance the War Powers Resolution that would block Trump from using military force in Venezuela without congressional approval. This is a significant step forward, but the fight is far from over. The full Senate vote could happen any day now, and then it moves to the House. Your voice matters at every stage of this fight. Over 2,500 JanePAC supporters have but Congress hasn’t acted yet, and we need your voice in this fight. This resolution is about drawing a clear line: no wars for oil, no unchecked executive power, no more fossil fuel greed disguised as foreign policy. We are incredibly grateful for the thousands of supporters who have already signed on — your voices are making a real difference. Now let's keep the pressure going. | In solidarity, — Team JanePAC Remember when Donald Trump promised Big Oil executives a “great deal” if they poured $1 billion into his campaign? What happened this weekend was proof he’s making good on that promise. Hours after the U.S. military carried out strikes in Venezuela and forcibly removed its president, Trump announced that the U.S. would “run the country” and take control of Venezuela’s oil. Without permission from Congress, without international approval, and without any public plan, Trump unilaterally ordered military action, seized a foreign head of state, and openly declared his intention to control another nation’s resources. Let that sink in. He wants U.S. oil companies to move in, “spend billions of dollars” to rebuild Venezuela's oil infrastructure, and start profiting from the country's resources. He even suggested deploying American troops — without asking Congress — to protect these corporate interests and “ get the oil flowing. ” Jane Fonda always says, we owe it to our children and their children to demand better. Ending our dependence on oil is part of that responsibility. Fossil fuels are making people sick, releasing toxic chemicals like dioxins, benzene, and naphthalene into our air, our water, and our food. What’s unfolding now is the inevitable result of fossil fuel greed combined with unchecked executive power and reckless militarism. This moment calls for restraint, diplomacy, and level-headed leadership. Since none of those qualities exist in the White House at this time, we must rely on Congress to act. The power to declare war belongs to Congress. Not the president. Not the Pentagon. Not fossil fuel executives whispering in the Oval Office. That’s why the U.S. Senate is preparing to vote on a War Powers Resolution that would force Trump to seek congressional approval before escalating further attacks on Venezuela. In solidarity, – JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: EMILYs List
subject: [SENATE 2026] We’re going all-in on Alaska, Peter

body:

| | | |

clean_body: Friend, don’t forget to sign Trump’s 1-year anniversary card. | | | | ANNIVERSARY ALERT! Just days remain until Trump’s 1-year anniversary as President. DON’T SHARE THIS WITH TRUMP BUT have you signed his card yet? President Trump received a beautiful message from you once and we’re confident that he’d love to see one from you AGAIN! That’s why YOU were one of the very few supporters selected to sign Trump’s card and add a personal message of praise, encouragement, or even constructive feedback. - Don Jr., Kristi Noem, Karoline Leavitt, Marco Rubio and many other Trump allies have already signed this card. So, what’s the hold up? Your name will be proudly displayed on the official card delivered straight to President Trump. We’re confident that the boss will be devastated if he doesn’t see your name at the top! Now that we’ve officially entered a critical midterm year, we need your help to keep fighting. Thank you for your unwavering support. Team Trump | | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. All contributions are subject to the limits and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (i.e., without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are strictly prohibited. Contributions made in the name of, or refunded by, any other person are unlawful. | Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc., P.O. Box 509, Arlington, VA 22216. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate’s Committee.

I'm reaching out to you from the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The **Sound of Freedom Foundation** team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. We don't wait.Today -- a child is waiting to be found.I'm personally asking you: will you help me rescue one before midnight?

Peter, the facts continue to haunt me and tear me apart every day:
---
* Most victims are only 12 years old
* 35-40 million suffer in sex trafficking worldwide every single day
* Less than 0.04% are ever found - but we can change that

---
We can't continue to stand by and let these children live in fear and terror.Your gift today goes straight to the next rescue:
---
* $25 keeps our 24/7 rescue hotline open one more shift
* $50 provides transportation to a safe house
* $100 gives one rescued child 72 hours in a safe house with a warm bed, food, and someone to hold them while they cry

---
I wish I could do this alone, but I can't.I need you with me today. Please don't close this email without helping. One child's future -- one little boy or girl who still believes someone is coming -- is hanging on what we do in the next few hours.Click below to give today - Every single dollar lands instantly where seconds save lives.

already selected his hand-picked candidate, Mike Rogers, who will be
nothing more than a rubber stamp for their agenda.

But here’s the thing: Polling shows Mallory is the candidate best
positioned to beat Rogers. And that makes us their number one target in
this race, so we need resources to be ready to respond to whatever they
throw at us.

We know you hear from us a lot, but if you care about the future of our
country and keeping Michigan blue, [ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-jan2026.Z4k7f1&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20260112_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=3618%2E898137%2EJg-x5H ]please join our campaign by making a

body:
After a very restful holiday, this campaign is back in the swing of things! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123203368/594688146/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2E4ODg4NS0wY2YwLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9eJUxBKbBwtLWqSYeokvaS4dt_PkRK2WSyeC2cf4laE=&emci=1c88d48e-ccef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=d7a88885-0cf0-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

After a very restful holiday, this campaign is back in the swing of things!

We're rolling up our sleeves, finalizing our plans for the on-year and deciding what we need to do to not just hold WA-08, but flip the House blue this November.

A big part of our plan is budgeting out each part of our campaign for the year–how much we need to spend on campaign literature; on pens and clipboards for volunteers; on lawn signs to spread across the district; on ads that we'll need to run on the airwaves and across social media.

To meet our budget, we have to continue hitting our critical fundraising goals. Right now, we're facing our very first hurdle of the new year: Our mid-month deadline.

Every goal we set is intentional. It's a checkpoint to make sure we're on track to afford every part of this campaign listed above. And, by the way, we run a tight ship. **This is how we stay competitive in a swing-district race where we already have three Republican opponents.**

Peter, we all know how critical it is to stop the Republicans this November. Their agenda is flawed. They aren’t tackling the issues Americans care about, like healthcare, the cost of living, and safety. Instead, they’re focused on anti-vaccine conspiracies, restricting abortion access, halting immigration, and undermining voting rights and our democracy. clean_body: After a very restful holiday, this campaign is back in the swing of things! Peter, After a very restful holiday, this campaign is back in the swing of things! We're rolling up our sleeves, finalizing our plans for the on-year and deciding what we need to do to not just hold WA-08, but flip the House blue this November. A big part of our plan is budgeting out each part of our campaign for the year–how much we need to spend on campaign literature; on pens and clipboards for volunteers; on lawn signs to spread across the district; on ads that we'll need to run on the airwaves and across social media. To meet our budget, we have to continue hitting our critical fundraising goals. Right now, we're facing our very first hurdle of the new year: Our mid-month deadline. Every goal we set is intentional. It's a checkpoint to make sure we're on track to afford every part of this campaign listed above. And, by the way, we run a tight ship. This is how we stay competitive in a swing-district race where we already have three Republican opponents. Peter, we all know how critical it is to stop the Republicans this November. Their agenda is flawed. They aren’t tackling the issues Americans care about, like healthcare, the cost of living, and safety. Instead, they’re focused on anti-vaccine conspiracies, restricting abortion access, halting immigration, and undermining voting rights and our democracy. Frankly, what they are most concerned about seems to be making sure they stay in lockstep with President Trump. They will continue to force this un-American agenda on us unless we stop them by winning back the majority. They're doing everything they can to hold onto their fragile majority. They are raising mountains of cash, cozying up with special interests, rigging congressional maps to favor their party, and attacking vote-by-mail to tip the scales in their favor. But let's get one thing straight, Peter: If you have to rig the system to win, you shouldn't be in office in the first place. The American people have made it clear they're ready for a different path. We need a blue House where leaders put people before politics and a Congress that leads by putting our communities first, not special interests. Peter,

Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself:

When something is broken, you don't complain - _you fix it._

That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient.

But today, something bigger is broken.

Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. _The people_.

The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom.

They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough.

**That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it.** To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone.

If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - **[I'm asking you to join this mission.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3fe47e7c1497429fadf13545e82dd864&_e=Rltpq3czk59x_2AAwbVG3R01W8sBtCuOIfNoOmUFKxG0rghsXiuhzG3RJQEFGsHH_wsONMxE6JVfFYbAPV5VXAamoS72N6-46m4lUEeagczDvbSpqiDDb-Pt3RNyqQS5hOMBibbBuZQmONIy8gPg2WM6rb_5-1bFBrdNZP7IBypLR8MHTGoKbyA3IAIBWs59Oo_mZuLnCM7xjjdkN775mliQLdFhbz-VHURD0SJ67B_BrFaziC3O2xmeYwYfyrWege6TCeYe7QG8mJ8xTyIFcs6lwgXb8nlesLFAXXH96yMmJwvq0uaErxtAB0NhidwvTH4OLEkr39ZLmB6uymngIQArrDv9sYGD38JM6lZ617EiQ2ooIiFggkK-LXyCiy_Rzof80EhM-0faYCJeDjxmkyLPOBJS6VU-OUCbwB16Cl9y6vYLJ7yUwopTjc2GipHmKRMv2sQKKL_ZQwcOijeFY4NHKHizD-1_zzRiQCbh1Q5f3W7nOAcu0B21Bq3sK_GTGOPFk27iVnJe9jfps9LwDa6KXqn1mlen3ez628gSgL3mWOTH44tXylyKA6bYyGg68KyLTQpzhgl3uzzk8twoeChyf2og9bxwEysGW-CTvvdGk4NTUKA0jCUW9iO1it6aX3QFosBvz1Hq6gkXKpGyEPCIiNJY0SrWKJV9hdI2o2o%3D)**

clean_body: When something is broken, you don't complain — you fix it. | Peter, Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself: When something is broken, you don't complain - you fix it. That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient. But today, something bigger is broken. Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. The people. The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom. They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough. That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it. To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone. If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - Thank you for being in this fight, Mark Lamb Republican for Congress, AZ-5 Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123203471/594688510/-507177818?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_260112_FR_3Steps_A0_na_U2_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzljYzU3Yi0wZGYwLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=krOJagbhYJtpQYejNur8TH9GFvnNdN_zMVaAnXnDnz4=) Getting more sleep. Joining a book club. Winning a targeted battleground House seat. No matter what shape your resolutions are taking this year, I know achieving them is much easier said than done. Here are the steps I take when I'm working to achieve a major goal. My hope is that they’ll help you tackle your own resolution for 2026 as well!
### **1\. Find your “why.”**
There are about a thousand reasons why I felt compelled to run for Congress again, but this was the sticking point: After 30 years defending American lives and laws, I refuse to abandon my duty in this moment of historic crisis for our nation. Fighting my way back to Capitol Hill won’t be easy, and that’s OK with me. My North Star, my “why,” will help me navigate the challenges ahead.
### **2\. Identify obstacles.**
A lackluster message, poor planning, attacks from opponents, unexpected dark-money cash dumps, shifting political winds, lack of funding...there’s no shortage of obstacles that can slow or even halt campaign momentum. I can’t avoid every possible pitfall, but I can minimize the danger by staying clear-eyed and well-informed, addressing small issues before they snowball, and keeping plans B, C, and D in my back pocket.
### **3\. Set milestones.**
Winning a battleground House race is a lofty goal. Setting smaller milestones along the way makes the process more manageable and accountable. For instance:
* ~~Roll out our launch.~~
* ~~Execute our budget and message strategy.~~
* ~~Secure key endorsements.~~
* File a strong FEC report.
* Reach across the aisle to undecided and swing voters.
* Flesh out my pro-national security, pro-prosperity, and anti-corruption agenda.
* Prepare for and win debates. Invest in an effective voter turnout strategy.
* Flip VA-02 and take back Congress.

Folks, if we want America to remain an international beacon of freedom for another two-and-a-half centuries, _**we cannot afford to lose this race.**_ [**Please consider contributing today to help me achieve the goal of flipping VA-02 and electing a Freedom First majority to Congress. clean_body: | | = Getting more sleep. Joining a book club. Winning a targeted battleground House seat. No matter what shape your resolutions are taking this year, I know achieving them is much easier said than done. Here are the steps I take when I'm working to achieve a major goal. My hope is that they’ll help you tackle your own resolution for 2026 as well! 1\. Find your “why.” There are about a thousand reasons why I felt compelled to run for Congress again, but this was the sticking point: After 30 years defending American lives and laws, I refuse to abandon my duty in this moment of historic crisis for our nation. Fighting my way back to Capitol Hill won’t be easy, and that’s OK with me. My North Star, my “why,” will help me navigate the challenges ahead. 2\. Identify obstacles. A lackluster message, poor planning, attacks from opponents, unexpected dark-money cash dumps, shifting political winds, lack of funding...there’s no shortage of obstacles that can slow or even halt campaign momentum. I can’t avoid every possible pitfall, but I can minimize the danger by staying clear-eyed and well-informed, addressing small issues before they snowball, and keeping plans B, C, and D in my back pocket. 3\. Set milestones. Winning a battleground House race is a lofty goal. Setting smaller milestones along the way makes the process more manageable and accountable. For instance: ~~Roll out our launch.~~ ~~Execute our budget and message strategy.~~ ~~Secure key endorsements.~~ File a strong FEC report. Reach across the aisle to undecided and swing voters. Flesh out my pro-national security, pro-prosperity, and anti-corruption agenda. Prepare for and win debates. Invest in an effective voter turnout strategy. Flip VA-02 and take back Congress. Folks, if we want America to remain an international beacon of freedom for another two-and-a-half centuries, we cannot afford to lose this race. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = With you, Elaine Luria | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to split a contribution today: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flhp-em-peltola/founding-donor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123203483/594688551/324381178?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDg5Y2M1N2ItMGRmMC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Kv7-ol_aSB9sv5JavjK9yS273DGFGs4NEoheCbJe06c=)** | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123203484/594688552/324381178?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDg5Y2M1N2ItMGRmMC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Kv7-ol_aSB9sv5JavjK9yS273DGFGs4NEoheCbJe06c=)

Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision.
When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance.
Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity.
Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find.
So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just crushing Alaska families.
And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. _They don’t even believe us._
They're focused on their own wallets — not ours.
And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest.
It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted.
I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home.
Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford.
Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again.
My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning.
But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption.
I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future.
**This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race... and that is together.**
So I am asking:
**[Please contribute to my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Fight Like Hell PAC today to become a Founding Donor. We are looking for a huge number of day one donors to get our campaign off to a strong start and put us in a position to win. No donation is too small. They will all add up fast.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123203485/594688553/324381178?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDg5Y2M1N2ItMGRmMC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Kv7-ol_aSB9sv5JavjK9yS273DGFGs4NEoheCbJe06c=)**

clean_body: I am running for U.S. Senate | = Hello — My name is Mary Peltola, and I want to share with you why I've made the decision to run for the United States Senate in Alaska — and to ask for your support as we begin this journey together. But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to split a contribution today: = | | = Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision. When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance. Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity. Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find. So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just crushing Alaska families. And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. They don’t even believe us. They're focused on their own wallets — not ours. And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest. It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted. I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home. Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford. Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again. My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning. But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption. I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future. This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race... and that is together. So I am asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight Like Hell PAC and Mary Peltola will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Mary Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. clean_body: | | | Unsubscribe Dear Peter, The new year brings new beginnings, and here at Team Dahlstrom, we are going full steam ahead! Nancy isn't taking anything for granted. She is putting in the hard work it will take to win for Alaska in November to keep our state on the right path going forward. She's already put out a plan to secure the PFD for future generations of Alaskans, pave the way for job creators to do what they do best, and support the industries Alaska does better than anybody else - like fishing, timber, tourism, and mining! We can't afford to leave our future to chance, and that's why it's so important to give Nancy our full support now. We'll make sure your contribution gets put to good use, running the efficient operation you can count on to deliver results. That's how Nancy has always governed, and it's how she's campaigning too! Nancy is uniquely qualified to be our next governor, keep our elections safe and secure, and ensure that Alaska's best days are still ahead of us. Sincerely, Chaz, Team Dahlstrom for Governor | | | | ---|--- Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor P.O.Box 770725, Eagle River, Alaska 99577

**Let me be blunt: if we lose this special election, Donald Trump wins.** The Republican who would replace Marjorie Taylor Greene wouldn't challenge Trump's illegal attack in Venezuela. They wouldn't ask questions or demand accountability. They'd be worse -- a quieter lapdog who rubber-stamps whatever Trump wants. That's exactly why this race matters. **I 'm running because Congress needs members who put the Constitution before any president. As an Army veteran, I know what happens when power goes unchecked -- history shows us the consequences every time.** This special election is our chance to put a real backstop in place. But Republicans are already flooding this race with money, betting Democrats won't show up. If we're going to win, we have to prove them wrong. [**Please donate today if you believe Congress should be a check on presidential abuse -- not a cheering section. name: Brad Finstad
subject: Caucus Night Is Coming Fast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Friends, On **February 3 at 7:00 p.m.** , Republicans across Minnesota will gather in school gyms, community centers, and meeting halls for precinct caucuses.
What happens that night will shape the entire 2026 election cycle.
Caucuses are where:
* Delegates are chosen
* Endorsement momentum begins
* Conservative grassroots energy is either unleashed — or squandered

But turnout doesn’t happen by accident.
Right now, we’re in the critical window where resources determine success. That means:
* Making sure every precinct has leadership in place
* Ensuring caucus locations are staffed and supported
* Educating voters who want to participate, but don’t know where to go or what to expect

The **Finstad Caucus Fund** is how we close those gaps before it’s too late.
Minnesota law guarantees people the right to take time off work to attend their local caucus. Schools and public bodies can’t schedule competing events that night. The system is designed to make participation possible, but only if we do the work to turn people out.
Democrats understand this. They always have.
The question is whether Republicans will match that effort at the most important grassroots moment of the year.
If you want conservatives organized, visible, and well prepared to succeed in November, I’m asking you to give to the Caucus Fund today and help us start the campaign season right on February 3rd.

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Are you also outraged by what's happening to our country right now, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RAJA FOR ILLINOIS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_senate-footer_q22025?amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_senate-footer_q22025?amount=5]

Are you outraged by what's happening to our country right now, Peter? I sure am.

I’m furious that ICE is running rampant, with no regard for the law, public safety, or the lives of everyday people.

I’m furious that Donald Trump is driving up prices and cutting essential programs like Medicaid and SNAP – with a cruel disregard for the consequences.

I’m furious that Trump is tearing apart our Democracy piece by piece — going after critical voices, the First Amendment, and the right to vote.

And most of all? I’m furious that the MAGA-controlled Senate is doing NOTHING to stop this total devastation of everything that makes our country great.

Look, these fights are personal to me. As a proud immigrant whose family once relied on food stamps and public housing, I know firsthand what’s at stake.

That’s why I’ve spent every single day taking these corrupt authoritarians on — fighting for SNAP, calling out Kristi Noem’s nonsense, and even getting the police called on me for trying to inspect ICE facilities.

It’s also why I’m running for Senate. But MAGA Republicans will stop at nothing to cling on to power — and they’ve already stockpiled over $300 million to defeat Democrats like me.

So Peter, if we’re going to take on Trump’s cruel and dangerous agenda, it’s going to take all hands on deck . That’s where you come in:

If you're as outraged as I am by what's happening to our country — and ready to fight back — please make a donation to my campaign today. We need to raise at least $10,000 by midnight, and your support is essential. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_em_q12026?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250]

Together, we can win the Senate and save our Republic.

Raja KrishnamoorthiDemocrat Raja Krishnamoorthi is running for Senate in Illinois to fight back against Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA movement, protect critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and rebuild the middle class.

clean_body: [] Are you outraged by what's happening to our country right now, Peter? I sure am. I’m furious that ICE is running rampant, with no regard for the law, public safety, or the lives of everyday people. I’m furious that Donald Trump is driving up prices and cutting essential programs like Medicaid and SNAP – with a cruel disregard for the consequences. I’m furious that Trump is tearing apart our Democracy piece by piece — going after critical voices, the First Amendment, and the right to vote. And most of all? I’m furious that the MAGA-controlled Senate is doing NOTHING to stop this total devastation of everything that makes our country great. Look, these fights are personal to me. As a proud immigrant whose family once relied on food stamps and public housing, I know firsthand what’s at stake. That’s why I’ve spent every single day taking these corrupt authoritarians on — fighting for SNAP, calling out Kristi Noem’s nonsense, and even getting the police called on me for trying to inspect ICE facilities. It’s also why I’m running for Senate. But MAGA Republicans will stop at nothing to cling on to power — and they’ve already stockpiled over $300 million to defeat Democrats like me. So Peter, if we’re going to take on Trump’s cruel and dangerous agenda, it’s going to take all hands on deck . That’s where you come in: If you're as outraged as I am by what's happening to our country — and ready to fight back — please make a donation to my campaign today. We need to raise at least $10,000 by midnight, and your support is essential. >> [] DONATE $10 → [] DONATE $25 → [] DONATE $50 → [] DONATE $100 → [] DONATE $250 → [] DONATE OTHER → [] Together, we can win the Senate and save our Republic. name: Eric Croft
subject: Did you hear? Mary Peltola’s running for Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
This is big news for Alaska—and the country. | | | |
---
Friend,
Mary Peltola is officially running for Senate, and **it’s incredible news for our state and our country.**
Mary is the kind of leader Alaska needs: passionate, grounded, and deeply rooted in the Alaska community. She listens first. She puts people over politics. And she has proven that she can win tough races by bringing people together.
**[Join NV Dems in helping the AK Dems support Mary Peltola’s campaign for Senate. Chip in $10 today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvbs9zJH3bzXGa-Qxcdd9sQpa_CMjjS8X6zOze4Nt-oZHwC6BJ94yx19sfyxi3SX_B2Nu57dJUkHKYRC8SdOgRp1TEoSr-FdIySvm8NLGQFCHYluvGAePqDYRkFpCBkZzH2dF1ZMtdFHItMa4KG2xrAIRteUaM5peqYk4YLQ6ZT41EbymsM8eY_fisVpbdGF-8r3TPVkLlN3UFMpqHG5CqkF3m4xG8QeeK5OnH65s9NQrVxtgiUvwXKJu9n5vItzHFKH7JeXR7jyoCnIehm4z3fAz8FfcR2laOoEOJeCW6oR2Qjqmr_2CfgQuLnRMrzU5heGo28KVjdVf3cT_-EI5tncc0rz6mkXDMKqIZRHAi3u60AYnH-dp-YTtEShUCgheIqgTrQB6XGXAHCsH9bkXwh2W2meTF1p4O3zq5kVf497A/4n8/0memV5qARD6sWTc8jE6OEw/h0/h001.-tKdhDBrgz1ExErlg5qXkTbPDL11Y-PZs7zy8W4s7CE)**
At a time when too many politicians are focused on themselves, **voters are being left behind. But Mary has stayed focused on Alaska –** with a priority of lowering prices, proposing term limits, and giving a voice to the voiceless.
This race will matter—not just for Alaska, but for the balance of power in DC. **The future of the U.S. Senate is going to be decided in the Last Frontier.**
[Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvbs9zJH3bzXGa-Qxcdd9sQpa_CMjjS8X6zOze4Nt-oZHwC6BJ94yx19sfyxi3SX_B2Nu57dJUkHKYRC8SdOgRpxmjOgU4bJWs4jPUVYFwCGq-Ux0rRF_mwxQmDLsFjGE1SwPbgBazkmEpBZKS1inFpzkNwA0LsvJmdw620nn4VGY92cBZAsxkOVjHMGb5qMZpxJEfBHSE3j1pVWuvoy1kUQqD5Awq1RsthC5y9BMbeDiwu8HrMuG6Tm6s9wG1XN2dUyyBGo_7xqHKIIJI0IOllUIxcMNSuyzqKJlbaizI_GKnUWJLj0hx0RDEVIv1Rov3p7MUXT0OW4bFvHRLTg1wLRSH7wy6HFqihlxRG_DW7UrDv5g53yH2eOb1Wu41hsGxfxIsoBABzAXVMy4ESsStN7suA6td8hDboGHpDnhOWfw/4n8/0memV5qARD6sWTc8jE6OEw/h1/h001.2b8HpwQZWZfvs7gpwJyy5GKpOvMEx9M5cJKuywCsrDA)
---
This race is winnable, **but only if we build the momentum to compete statewide** in a place as big and complex as Alaska. That means organizing early, reaching voters in rural areas, and standing up to well-funded opposition.
That’s where supporters like you come in. Early support helps Mary move faster, organize smarter, and give her campaign the foundation it needs to win.

clean_body: This is big news for Alaska—and the country. | | | | Friend, Mary Peltola is officially running for Senate, and it’s incredible news for our state and our country. Mary is the kind of leader Alaska needs: passionate, grounded, and deeply rooted in the Alaska community. She listens first. She puts people over politics. And she has proven that she can win tough races by bringing people together. At a time when too many politicians are focused on themselves, voters are being left behind. But Mary has stayed focused on Alaska – with a priority of lowering prices, proposing term limits, and giving a voice to the voiceless. This race will matter—not just for Alaska, but for the balance of power in DC. The future of the U.S. Senate is going to be decided in the Last Frontier. This race is winnable, but only if we build the momentum to compete statewide in a place as big and complex as Alaska. That means organizing early, reaching voters in rural areas, and standing up to well-funded opposition. That’s where supporters like you come in. Early support helps Mary move faster, organize smarter, and give her campaign the foundation it needs to win. The future of our state, and our nation, depends on the decisions we make today. We are entering a new chapter— it starts today, and it starts with you. In solidarity, Eric Croft Chair Alaska Democratic Party The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: This isn’t just about Idaho and West Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Why is the Supreme Court wasting time deciding whether to rip civil rights away from a handful of teens? | |
---
Peter, **The Supreme Court’s first oral arguments of 2026 are scheduled for tomorrow.** They’ll hear two cases on the legality of banning trans youth from participating in school sports. _Little v. Hecox_ centers around an Idaho law banning transgender girls and women from competing on female sports teams in public schools and colleges. _West Virginia v. B.P.J_ addresses the same kind of law in West Virginia. **But this is about way more than just Idaho and West Virginia. The Court’s ruling could affect the rights of trans kids and teenagers nationwide.** One of the most radical things the MAGA justices could do in these cases is to change the definition of “sex” under the federal law that bans discrimination on the basis of sex. If they define “sex” as biological sex at birth, it could uphold anti-trans legislation already on the books in several states. If the Court rules against transgender youth, it could allow states across the country to more freely restrict their rights, and allow the concept of “biological sex” to affect their access to their school’s facilities, programs, and participation opportunities. **You can count the number of trans youth athletes in America on one hand.** So why is the Supreme Court spending time considering taking away the right of a few teenagers to have fun with their friends on the sports field? **Because the Supreme Court is no longer interested in democracy. It’s interested in doing the bidding of the wealthy and powerful special interests who pull their strings.** Two lower courts blocked Idaho and West Virginia’s anti-trans athlete laws, declaring them unconstitutional and discriminatory. But we’ve seen time and time again that this Court will silence lower courts in order to rip rights away from everyday Americans, and in fact they have [already issued a devastating ruling last year stripping trans kids of critical health care services](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SEgofQhSb9pGg8bz5XQG3ZbsKO2VstiADKwqRiPdnZ20HcVEgBrqerIaG7k3RlGN8qnelfk_0I3Fj_KX0OAoxD5Ufg20wghxrVjmzFVuI5RfX04c1XkBUzKzYpB97pvf26TGY54rvMCNlaIY7657kI1evBsPe8dOFr1bUyR8RKC3fLg7lcqgfgQWttFAWX9SuC3FiWrCKzrJkP7dGLB_s2BfVsh32VD9PeMpO-MF4BeFkd3CUg4wI5c79XFobKJ6B0xa5QbTRq06CwytyvjvTq7ZASUqi759Pvq_cnDUL3T9xBsNkttanMRo2AoUivgkt32Fp1rYUe3d-gkdHtgEprDQmVlmPFGHD6P9xaQawdiMIL33uzWW6fnxyoyn9eAP/4n8/jaGJxd-dRN-1mcvUIzpH0g/h0/h001.BLwAV7D9bLMeQ1QkLciN0_R_cTmtrx9PEX8wnjvo73M) in Tennessee and other red states. **This country is supposed to be a democracy. The Supreme Court shouldn’t get to decide who gets to play on the high school soccer team. But this is the dystopian America MAGA has packed the courts to build.** Today they’re trying to control trans athletes—tomorrow they could turn their backwards moral panic on punishing gay teenagers (again), or stripping more rights away from women (again). **United for Democracy will be here every step of the way to fight for the rights of all Americans, including youth trans athletes. We won’t be silent while a corrupt and purchased Supreme Court turns its back on our Constitution.** Thank you for fighting for our rights, Stasha Rhodes
United for Democracy
---

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Just need a minute or two this Monday
body:
I just checked in with my team.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=334%2E124072%2EvVsWXd)
Hello, Peter — I hope your week is starting off well. I only need a minute or two of your time this Monday. I just checked in with our finance team, and I wanted to update you on where things stand today. We’re approaching the halfway point in the month. Ideally, we’d also like to be about halfway to our January fundraising target by the end of the day on Thursday. As we get closer to Election Day, our team’s expenses will only grow. From here on out, we can’t lower our financial targets. We have a new opponent in the race. Far-right groups are preparing to spend hundreds of millions against me. And President Trump has personally singled me out for attack. We can’t afford to fall behind now. **[I’m personally asking you to pitch in to help hit our mid-January goal by our Thursday deadline. Any amount you can give would help.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3836?t=7&akid=334%2E124072%2EvVsWXd)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3837?t=8&akid=334%2E124072%2EvVsWXd)

---
I appreciate your support,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3836?t=14&akid=334%2E124072%2EvVsWXd)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=334%2E124072%2EvVsWXd)**

The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=334%2E124072%2EvVsWXd)

name: Team KTR Communications
subject: KTR: ELECTION-YEAR SPIN WON’T ERASE HOBBS’ RECORD
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA
body:
After Three Years of Radical Vetoes, Hobbs Tries to Rewrite Her Record

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/karrinforarizona/hobbsspeech?e=ebfb0fda52)
---
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=9f56b97f7b&e=ebfb0fda52)
| | | | | |
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** January 12th, 2026

**KTR: ELECTION-YEAR SPIN WON’T ERASE HOBBS’ RECORD** _After Three Years of Radical Vetoes, Hobbs Tries to Rewrite Her Record_
**PHOENIX, AZ** — Following Governor Katie Hobbs’ State of the State address today, Karrin Taylor Robson released the following statement:
“Now that it’s an election year, career politician Katie Hobbs is trying to paint herself as a moderate. But Arizonans know the truth: for three years, she has done whatever the radical left demanded and vetoed common-sense legislation that would have made our state safer, stronger, and more affordable.
This is a governor whose administration is drowning in dysfunction. Hobbs is under investigation for corruption, and Arizona has watched her administration lurch from one self-inflicted disaster to the next. Katie Hobbs ignited these crises, and now she’s trying to take credit for putting them out, like an arsonist tossing a bucket of water on a five-alarm fire.
She lectured about safety after cheering on Joe Biden’s open-border agenda. She read scripted lines about affordability while families pay more for everything and bring home less. She attacked ESAs because they work for parents, instead of focusing on improving public schools that are failing too many kids. And she talked about our housing crisis after she halted construction, created uncertainty for builders, and drove prices even higher.
Arizona deserves better. It’s time to fire career politician Katie Hobbs.”
---
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=ec05d5ca79&e=ebfb0fda52)
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=8b0f5668a8&e=ebfb0fda52)
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=cad754f69e&e=ebfb0fda52)
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=274afca504&e=ebfb0fda52)
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=9661e0015f&e=ebfb0fda52)
| |
**About Karrin Taylor Robson** Karrin Taylor Robson is a lifelong conservative and business executive running for Governor of Arizona with President Trump’s endorsement.
Just like President Trump, Karrin is not a politician; she is a self-made business executive who has built one of the state’s leading land-use and economic development firms. Her work has helped bring jobs, opportunity, and growth to Arizona while cutting through bureaucracy and fighting government overreach. She’s also served on key military and education boards that impact Arizona families every day, including for more than 20 years on the Air Force Chief of Staff’s Civic Leaders Group.
A proud wife, mother of four, and grandmother, Karrin is running for Governor to keep our communities safe, fix, root out waste, fraud, and abuse in Arizona, and she will always have President Trump's back.
---
|
---

name: Mary Peltola
subject: I am running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123204493/594691368/-1084865246?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.12_OTS-Mary-Peltola-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjRlNTkwYi0xMmYwLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x1UMCfwAiOqare5Kg5qaY5AamTAvEFlC-pdIU3kyFWo=) Hello – My name is Mary Peltola, and I want to share with you why I've made the decision to run for the United States Senate in Alaska – and to ask for your support as we begin this journey together. But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to contribute today: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q12026_ots-peltola-split/founding-donor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123204494/594691369/-1084865246?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.12_OTS-Mary-Peltola-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjRlNTkwYi0xMmYwLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x1UMCfwAiOqare5Kg5qaY5AamTAvEFlC-pdIU3kyFWo=)** | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123204495/594691370/-1084865246?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.12_OTS-Mary-Peltola-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjRlNTkwYi0xMmYwLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x1UMCfwAiOqare5Kg5qaY5AamTAvEFlC-pdIU3kyFWo=)
---
Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision.
When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance.
Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity.
Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find.
So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just _crushing_ Alaska families.
And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. _They don’t even believe us._
They're focused on their own wallets – not ours.
And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest.
It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted.
I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home.
Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford.
Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again.
My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning.
But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption.
I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future.
**This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race ... and that is together.**
So I am asking:
**[Please contribute to my campaign for the U.S. Senate today to become a Founding Donor. We are looking for a huge number of day one donors to get our campaign off to a strong start and put us in a position to win. No donation is too small. clean_body: | = Hello – My name is Mary Peltola, and I want to share with you why I've made the decision to run for the United States Senate in Alaska – and to ask for your support as we begin this journey together. But if you already understand how important this race and your support are, and you’re ready to become a Founding Donor to our campaign, please use this link to contribute today: = | | = Now here’s a bit more on how I came to this decision. When I was growing up in Bethel, salmon fishing with my father in the summers and dog mushing in the winters, Alaska was a place of abundance. Now, all across Alaska, we have scarcity. Multi-national companies are trawling our waters and decimating our fish stocks. The moose, caribou, and migratory birds that used to fill our freezers are harder to find. So we buy more groceries, where the prices are just crushing Alaska families. And I've got to tell you, DC people do not care that we are paying 17 bucks for a gallon of milk. They don’t even believe us. They're focused on their own wallets – not ours. And when they actually work together on something, it’s usually to help themselves. The rigged system in DC is shutting down Alaska and hurting all of us while politicians and their millionaire and billionaire donors feather their own nest. It’s why our prices are rising, and our heating bills keep going up. All while the health care and services Alaskans rely on get gutted. I'm done with politicians getting richer while things get tougher here at home. Systemic change is the only way to bring down grocery costs, save our fisheries, lower energy prices, and build new housing Alaskans can actually afford. Systemic change is the only way to fill our homes with abundance again. My agenda for Alaska will always be: fish, family, freedom. These values have been the core values of my campaigns since the very beginning. But if we’re going to secure Alaska’s future, we need another priority: fighting corruption. I'm running for Alaska's Senate seat because it is the fight for our future. This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the next election, and I cannot do this alone. There is only one way we’ll be able to win this race ... and that is together. So I am asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mary Peltola and Off the Sidelines PAC will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Mary © 2026 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
